notes.note: Articles › CUBIG Launches AI-Ready Data OS ‘SynTitan’🎉

segment.source: CUBIG launches SynTitan, an AI-ready Data OS designed to help enterprises transform data into actionable insights and accelerate AI-driven decision-making
segment.target: CUBIG이 기업 데이터를 실행 가능한 인사이트로 전환하고 AI 기반 의사 결정을 가속하는 AI-Ready Data OS SynTitan을 출시했습니다

segment.source:
SynTitan Launch: An AI-Ready Data OS for Enterprise Decision-Making

On January 30, CUBIG officially launched SynTitan, a Data OS that automatically transforms incomplete enterprise data into AI-Ready data, enabling faster and more reliable business decision-making — even without data science experts.

SynTitan is designed to generate a synthetic and refined data layer without directly accessing raw data, allowing organizations to run analytics, prediction, and simulation workflows immediately.


AI Agents Are Scaling — Data Readiness Becomes the Real Advantage

As AI agents move rapidly into enterprise environments, data readiness is becoming a key differentiator.

According to Gartner, AI Agents and AI-Ready Data are among the fastest-advancing technologies. Deloitte projects that by 2026, 75% of enterprises will invest in agentic AI, while IDC expects up to 40% of Global 2000 employees to collaborate with AI agents.

Across industries, AI is no longer experimental — it is becoming core enterprise infrastructure.

The Real Bottleneck in AI Adoption: Data Governance and Structure

Despite growing adoption, many organizations still struggle to operationalize AI.

The most common barriers include:

  • Lack of proper data governance and infrastructure

  • Fragmented data silos across teams

  • Data quality issues such as missing values, bias, and imbalance

  • Regulatory constraints around privacy and compliance

In many cases, enterprises have plenty of data — but not in a form that AI systems can safely or effectively use.

A Synthetic, AI-Ready Data Layer — Without Accessing Raw Data

SynTitan was designed to address this structural problem.

Using DTS-based synthetic data generation and transformation, SynTitan:

  • Restores data quality

  • Fills missing values

  • Preserves statistical distributions and correlations

  • Standardizes data into an AI-Ready synthetic data layer

This approach allows teams across the organization to work with the same analytical baseline, without exposing sensitive raw data.

Zero-Access Architecture for Enterprise AI Compliance

SynTitan adopts a Zero-Access security model:

  • Raw data remains entirely within the enterprise environment

  • External AI models and AI agents interact only with synthetic data

This architecture supports emerging regulatory requirements around transparency and safety, while enabling AI in the enterprise to scale responsibly.

Rather than limiting data usage due to risk, SynTitan enables organizations to use more data — securely.

Enabling AI for Data Analytics Across the Organization

With SynTitan, teams across the enterprise can perform advanced analytics that were previously restricted by privacy concerns:

  • Marketing teams can analyze customer behavior and simulate campaign outcomes

  • HR teams can predict attrition and model organizational changes

  • Finance and risk teams can detect anomalies and model transaction risk

  • Strategy teams can run scenario-based market simulations

SynTitan also automates AI-driven decision reports, reducing reporting cycles from weeks to hours.

A Scalable Environment for AI Agents and Data Strategy

SynTitan is not a fixed-function platform.

It is designed as a scalable AI and data operating environment, where domain-specific AI agents can run safely on top of a governed, synthetic data layer.

Currently, SynTitan is being validated in finance, insurance, and security sectors, with planned expansion into telecommunications and healthcare.

📎 Read more
Read the full article(Click)📰

#CUBIG #AI agents #Ai for the data analytics #ai-ready #AI-ready data #data governance #Data OS #DataPrivacy #Synthetic Data #syntheticdata

notes.note: Articles › 🏆 CUBIG Named to the 2026 Emerging AI+X Top 100

segment.source: 🏆 CUBIG Named to the 2026 Emerging AI+X Top 100
CUBIG has been selected for the 2026 Emerging AI+X Top 100, recognized for turning restricted data into AI-ready datasets with strong AI privacy and compliance by design.
segment.target: CUBIG이 강력한 AI 프라이버시와 설계 기반 컴플라이언스를 통해 제한된 데이터를 AI-Ready 데이터셋으로 전환하는 기술력을 인정받아 2026 신흥 AI+X Top 100에 선정되었습니다.

segment.source:
🎉 A milestone for CUBIG in AI-ready data and AI privacy

Hello from CUBIG, building a world where data can be used safely and confidently.

We’re excited to share that CUBIG has been selected for the 2026 Emerging AI+X Top 100, hosted by the Korea Artificial Intelligence Industry Association (AIIA).

This program highlights 100 high-potential AI companies driving innovation through cross-industry adoption and measurable impact.

For us, it’s a meaningful signal that AI success depends not only on models, but on data that is actually usable under real-world constraints.

We’ll continue expanding our infrastructure to help organizations unlock value from data without compromising AI privacy.

🧠 Why CUBIG was recognized: making data AI-ready in practice

CUBIG was recognized for transforming data blocked by quality issues and privacy regulations into AI-ready datasets that teams can use immediately.

At the center is DTS (Data Transform System), our synthetic data engine designed for operational deployment, not just experimentation.

DTS automatically diagnoses and corrects missing values, bias, and imbalance to improve model reliability.

It also manages rare edge cases statistically, helping teams address the long-tail scenarios that break AI performance in production.

By solving data usability at the source, DTS helps organizations move beyond PoC into scalable AI execution.

🔐 Zero-Access architecture with Differential Privacy by design

Data is often unusable because sharing or exporting it introduces leakage risk and re-identification concerns.

CUBIG addresses this with a Zero-Access architecture where original data does not leave the organization.

We combine this with Differential Privacy to mathematically control re-identification risk while preserving analytical utility.

This design supports regulated industries such as finance, healthcare, manufacturing, and the public sector.

DTS can generate and share synthetic data across tabular, text, image, and time-series formats within a single engine.

🧩 A full data and AI privacy infrastructure portfolio

CUBIG goes beyond a single product by building an end-to-end data and AI privacy infrastructure layer.

Alongside DTS, our portfolio includes SynTitan for collaborative data workflows and decision-ready analysis.

LLM Capsule provides an AI privacy gateway for public LLM usage, helping teams prevent sensitive input exposure.

azoo extends the ecosystem as a synthetic data marketplace that connects supply and demand in a privacy-preserving way.

Together, these products connect internal data assets with external AI services while keeping compliance and AI privacy at the core.

🚀 What’s next

Following this recognition, CUBIG will expand partnerships across finance, healthcare, manufacturing, and the public sector.

We will accelerate AI-ready data initiatives, strengthen go-to-market collaboration, and broaden ecosystem linkages through our marketplace approach.

Our goal remains consistent: help organizations unlock data value beyond regulatory and security barriers.

We believe trusted data infrastructure will define the next wave of AI+X innovation.

CUBIG will keep building the foundation that makes safe, scalable AI possible.

📎 Read more
Read the full article(Click)📰

#CUBIG #EmergingAIxTop100 #AIReadyData #SyntheticData #AIPrivacy #DifferentialPrivacy #DataInfrastructure #SynTitan #LLMCapsule #azoo #AIX

notes.note: Articles › 🌍 Connecting the World While Protecting Data: How CUBIG Is Redefining Safe AI Adoption

segment.source: 🌍 Connecting the World While Protecting Data: How CUBIG Is Redefining Safe AI Adoption
segment.target: 🌍 데이터를 보호하며 세계를 연결하다: CUBIG의 안전한 AI 도입 재정의

segment.source: A Japanese media interview highlights how CUBIG enables secure data utilization through synthetic data and AI privacy technologies, supporting global expansion under strict regulatory environments.
segment.target: 일본 언론 인터뷰를 통해 CUBIG이 합성 데이터와 AI 프라이버시 기술로 안전한 데이터 활용을 실현하고, 엄격한 규제 환경에서 글로벌 확장을 지원하는 방법을 소개합니다.

segment.source:
🌱 Welcome from CUBIG: enabling safe data use in a regulated world

As data-driven innovation accelerates, organizations around the world face a common challenge: how to use data effectively without compromising privacy. In a recent Japanese media interview, CUBIG was introduced as a company tackling this challenge at its core.

The article highlights CUBIG’s mission to protect sensitive data while making it practically usable for analysis and AI development. Rather than treating privacy and utilization as opposing goals, CUBIG approaches them as two elements that must be designed together.

This philosophy sets the foundation for CUBIG’s technology and global strategy.

🔐 Zero-Access synthetic data as a structural solution

One of the key points emphasized in the interview is CUBIG’s Zero-Access architecture for synthetic data generation.

CUBIG creates high-fidelity synthetic data without directly accessing original datasets, preserving statistical characteristics while eliminating re-identification risk.

By applying Differential Privacy, the system maintains analytical value while structurally protecting personal and confidential information.

This approach supports tabular, text, image, and time-series data within a single framework.

It is particularly effective in highly regulated environments such as finance, healthcare, and the public sector.

🤖 Practical AI adoption with LLM Capsule

The article also highlights LLM Capsule, CUBIG’s solution for secure use of generative AI. While many organizations want to adopt tools like ChatGPT or Claude, concerns around data leakage and internal network restrictions remain major barriers.

LLM Capsule allows enterprises to use large language models without sending sensitive data outside their environment.
Compared to building private LLMs, it significantly reduces cost and deployment time.

This positions CUBIG as a practical enabler of enterprise-grade generative AI adoption.

📊 Proven performance in public and private sectors

CUBIG’s synthetic data technology has already been validated across public and private sectors in Korea.
The system preserves over 99 percent of the original data’s statistical structure while correcting bias, imbalance, and missing values.

By treating synthetic data as a quality-improvement engine rather than a simple anonymization tool, CUBIG enhances AI training performance.

Use cases include document anonymization, policy simulation, internal AI deployment, and financial risk analysis.

Organizations value the ability to conduct AI analysis without exporting sensitive original data.

🌍 Expanding globally under diverse regulatory environments

The interview underscores that data protection challenges are not unique to Japan. In Europe, GDPR has accelerated demand for synthetic data and AI privacy technologies, leading CUBIG to establish a UK subsidiary.

In the United States, rapid adoption of generative AI is also increasing the need for data protection solutions.

CUBIG’s strategy focuses on adapting its technology to each region’s regulatory and industrial context.

Through this approach, the company aims to set a new global standard for safe data utilization.

🚀 A vision for a connected and privacy-safe data ecosystem

CUBIG’s long-term vision is to create a world where data can be used freely without compromising security. Protection mechanisms should not create friction but instead enable confident collaboration and innovation.

By reconnecting previously unusable data to AI and analytics through synthetic data, CUBIG is building a new data environment.

The company aims not just to deliver products, but to establish a comprehensive data infrastructure ecosystem.

Together with global partners, including those in Japan, CUBIG plans to expand this vision worldwide.


📎 Read more
Read the full article(Click)📰

#CUBIG #SyntheticData #AIPrivacy #DataProtection #GlobalExpansion #JapanMarket #DifferentialPrivacy #GenerativeAI #SecureAI

notes.note: Articles › 🔐 CUBIG Proposes a Synthetic-Data Strategy to Reduce PIA Burden and Build AI-Ready Infrastructure

segment.source: 🔐 CUBIG Proposes a Synthetic-Data Strategy to Reduce PIA Burden and Build AI-Ready Infrastructure
segment.target: 🔐 CUBIG, 개인정보 영향평가 부담 경감 및 AI-Ready 인프라 구축을 위한 합성 데이터 전략 제안

segment.source: CUBIG introduces a DTS-based approach that helps public and financial institutions reduce privacy impact assessment burden and accelerate AI adoption using privacy-preserving synthetic data
segment.target: CUBIG이 프라이버시 보존 합성 데이터를 활용하여 공공 및 금융 기관의 개인정보 영향평가 부담을 줄이고 AI 도입을 가속하는 DTS 기반 접근법을 소개합니다

segment.source:
🌱 Welcome to CUBIG – making sensitive data usable without anxiety

As large-scale data breach incidents continue to rise, public and financial institutions are facing growing pressure to strengthen privacy controls while still moving forward with AI adoption.

In many cases, organizations have the data they need, but practical barriers such as PIA requirements, operational risk, and compliance uncertainty slow down real execution.

CUBIG presents a synthetic-data-driven strategy that allows institutions to address privacy risks structurally, not only procedurally.

By shifting high-risk processing areas away from original personal data, institutions can reduce exposure while keeping AI initiatives on track.

This update aligns with the 2025.10 revision of the PIA guidelines and the broader push for AI-ready, regulation-aligned data operations.


🚨 Why PIA is changing: new AI evaluation items and rising breach risk

Recent breach reports have intensified public concern, especially as major incidents across telecom and card sectors have affected large populations.

Against this backdrop, the Personal Information Protection Commission and KISA released an updated Public Institutions PIA Guideline in October 2025.

The most notable change is the introduction of a dedicated AI evaluation area, covering privacy risks across both development and training stages as well as operational governance.

For large-scale or sensitive-data projects, the guideline emphasizes early assessment, technical safeguards, and credible alternative measures that reduce risk in practice.

This means institutions need not only documentation, but also an implementable method to lower risk while still enabling analysis and AI workflows.

🧩 Synthetic data as a practical alternative for safe analysis and AI training

In parallel, the Personal Information Protection Commission has highlighted synthetic data through separate guidance on generation and usage.

Synthetic data can reproduce structural and statistical characteristics without directly using real data, enabling analytics, model training, and policy research with reduced leakage risk.

In other words, PIA identifies and quantifies risk, while synthetic data provides a concrete way to reduce that risk at the data layer.

For high-sensitivity domains, this approach makes it easier to move from “risk management on paper” to “risk reduction by design.”

CUBIG’s proposal is built around this shift, helping institutions adopt AI with confidence under tightening privacy expectations.

🔐 DTS: Non-Access architecture plus Differential Privacy for AI-ready datasets

CUBIG’s DTS is designed to help institutions replace high-risk processing areas identified during PIA with privacy-preserving synthetic datasets.

DTS follows a Non-Access architecture: original data remains inside the institution’s internal network while the system learns statistical patterns and generates entirely new synthetic data.

By combining this with Differential Privacy, DTS mathematically controls re-identification risk and supports compliance-ready operation for sensitive environments.

This approach is intended to align with key requirements across Korea’s data laws, the Personal Information Protection Act, and GDPR-level expectations.

The result is an AI-ready dataset that supports analysis and model development while keeping strict control over original sensitive data.

📄 SynData Report: quantitative evidence you can attach to PIA deliverables

DTS supports multiple data formats, including tables, text, images, and time-series data, reflecting real-world public and financial data complexity.

After generation, DTS automatically produces a SynData Report that measures statistical similarity, machine learning performance, and re-identification risk.

This gives institutions measurable evidence for both safety and utility—two areas that PIA deliverables increasingly require in concrete terms.

Instead of relying on narrative explanations alone, teams can provide metrics and verification outputs as part of their assessment documentation.

Over time, this improves internal review confidence and helps shorten the cycle from assessment to real deployment.

🚀 Moving toward AI-ready public and financial operations, powered by infrastructure

CUBIG’s CEO Ho Bae noted that repeated large-scale breaches have increased concerns that PIA can become a documentation-only process if there is no practical way to reduce risk.

DTS addresses this gap by enabling institutions to build AI-ready synthetic data without using sensitive originals, and by generating verification outputs that can be attached directly to assessment reports.

CUBIG plans to expand PIA-linked synthetic data models through public-sector consulting, AI-ready dataset projects, and cross-organization synthetic data combination pilots.

By connecting regulation, assessment, and data operations into a single workflow, institutions can advance both compliance and digital transformation.

CUBIG will continue developing practical standards for trustworthy AI adoption in highly regulated environments.

📎 Read more
Read the full article(Click)📰

#CUBIG #DTS #SyntheticData #AIprivacy #PrivacyImpactAssessment #PIA #DifferentialPrivacy #PublicSectorAI #FinancialAI #AIReady

📄 SynData Report: quantitative evidence you can attach to PIA deliverables

DTS supports multiple data formats, including tables, text, images, and time-series data, reflecting real-world public and financial data complexity.

After generation, DTS automatically produces a SynData Report that measures statistical similarity, machine learning performance, and re-identification risk.

This gives institutions measurable evidence for both safety and utility—two areas that PIA deliverables increasingly require in concrete terms.

Instead of relying on narrative explanations alone, teams can provide metrics and verification outputs as part of their assessment documentation.

Over time, this improves internal review confidence and helps shorten the cycle from assessment to real deployment.

🚀 Moving toward AI-ready public and financial operations, powered by infrastructure

CUBIG’s CEO Ho Bae noted that repeated large-scale breaches have increased concerns that PIA can become a documentation-only process if there is no practical way to reduce risk.

DTS addresses this gap by enabling institutions to build AI-ready synthetic data without using sensitive originals, and by generating verification outputs that can be attached directly to assessment reports.

CUBIG plans to expand PIA-linked synthetic data models through public-sector consulting, AI-ready dataset projects, and cross-organization synthetic data combination pilots.

By connecting regulation, assessment, and data operations into a single workflow, institutions can advance both compliance and digital transformation.

CUBIG will continue developing practical standards for trustworthy AI adoption in highly regulated environments.

notes.note: Articles › CUBIG DTS Leading the Era of AI-Ready Public Data 🚀 Transforming High-Risk Government Data Safely

segment.source: CUBIG DTS Leading the Era of AI-Ready Public Data 🚀 Transforming High-Risk Government Data Safely
segment.target: CUBIG DTS, AI-Ready 공공 데이터 시대를 선도 🚀 고위험 정부 데이터의 안전한 전환

segment.source: CUBIG DTS enables government agencies to safely convert sensitive public data into AI-ready synthetic datasets that meet security, compliance, and analytical requirements.
segment.target: CUBIG DTS는 정부 기관이 민감한 공공 데이터를 보안, 컴플라이언스, 분석 요구사항을 충족하는 AI-Ready 합성 데이터셋으로 안전하게 전환할 수 있도록 지원합니다.

segment.source:
🌱 Welcome to CUBIG – shaping the future of safe and intelligent public data

As governments worldwide shift toward AI-driven administration, the demand for public data that is both safe and immediately usable for machine learning continues to grow.

CUBIG is excited to introduce how DTS, our secure synthetic data infrastructure, is becoming a critical enabler for this transformation. With public institutions now required to open higher-value, AI-friendly datasets, synthetic data is emerging as the most practical path forward.

DTS supports this movement by ensuring that sensitive information never leaves the organization while still generating data suitable for analytics, policy modeling, and AI services.

🔐 A Policy Shift Toward Quality and AI-Readiness

The Ministry of the Interior and Safety recently surpassed 102,000 datasets on the Public Data Portal and announced a transition from large-scale disclosure toward high-value, AI-ready data.

New evaluation criteria introduced in 2025 include efforts to provide AI-friendly datasets and performance in pseudonymized or synthetic data opening. This effectively positions synthetic data as a requirement rather than an option.

However, many of the most valuable datasets—such as resident registration, healthcare, welfare, and civil complaints—cannot be opened due to privacy risks. In response, regulatory bodies including the Personal Information Protection Commission have issued guidelines endorsing synthetic data as a means to simultaneously protect personal information and enable meaningful public data usage.

Synthetic data is now recognized as the foundation for AI training, policy simulation, and public–private innovation.

🚀 DTS: A Non-Access Infrastructure Purpose-Built for Public Institutions

CUBIG DTS is uniquely designed around a non-access architecture where original data never leaves the institution. Instead of exporting raw data, the system learns only statistical patterns and generates entirely new synthetic datasets within a secure internal environment.

Advanced techniques such as Differential Privacy mathematically control re-identification risk, enabling agencies to validate safety before publishing or sharing data. DTS also includes built-in tools to measure statistical similarity, model performance, and privacy risks, providing quantitative verification essential for government compliance.

This ensures alignment with Korea’s data protection laws, the Data 3 Act, and even GDPR-equivalent requirements, making DTS suitable for handling high-risk public datasets.

💡 One Platform for Tables, Text, Images, and Time-Series

DTS supports a wide range of public sector data formats including tabular administrative data, civil complaint text, medical and industrial images, and sensor or log-based time-series data.

This unified pipeline allows institutions to build AI-ready data lakes, prepare datasets for the Public Data Portal, and support joint research across ministries and external organizations.

By converting sensitive datasets into synthetic versions, agencies can safely accelerate projects involving cross-agency collaboration, predictive modeling, and service innovation.

This enables a level of data usability that traditional anonymization cannot match, positioning synthetic data as the new standard for public sector AI.

🌍 Expanding AI-Ready Public Data Across Central and Local Government

CUBIG has already validated DTS through projects in finance, defense, and public agencies. Moving forward, the company plans to integrate DTS with SynTitan and SynLake to provide tailored AI-ready packages for ministries and local governments.

CEO Ho Bae emphasized that the goal of public data opening is shifting from simply releasing data to providing data that AI can immediately use for real-world impact. DTS empowers public institutions to share data safely with private and research organizations while advancing their own AI-driven administrative services.

CUBIG will continue expanding demonstrations, AI-ready dataset projects, and cross-ministry synthetic data collaborations to help shape the future of government innovation.


📎 Read more

Read the full article(Click)📰


#CUBIG #DTS #SyntheticData #AIReady #PublicData #DifferentialPrivacy #GovTech #SynTitan #SynLake #TrustedAI

notes.note: Articles › CUBIG SynTitan Gains Global Momentum 🚀 From Korean Finance to UK Venture Capital

segment.source: CUBIG SynTitan Gains Global Momentum 🚀 From Korean Finance to UK Venture Capital
segment.target: CUBIG SynTitan, 글로벌 확장 가속 🚀 한국 금융에서 영국 벤처 캐피털까지

segment.source: CUBIG’s SynTitan enables privacy-safe AI by generating high-quality synthetic data without exposing sensitive information, attracting strong interest from global enterprises and UK venture capital.
segment.target: CUBIG의 SynTitan은 민감 정보를 노출하지 않고 고품질 합성 데이터를 생성하여 프라이버시 안전 AI를 실현하며, 글로벌 기업과 영국 벤처 캐피털의 높은 관심을 받고 있습니다.

segment.source:
🌱 Welcome to CUBIG – enabling safe and meaningful AI innovation

CUBIG is building a future where enterprises can fully leverage their data without facing the barriers of privacy regulations or data quality issues. Many organizations today possess vast amounts of information, yet they are unable to use it due to sensitive attributes, missing values, or inconsistent formats. SynTitan solves this long-standing challenge by generating synthetic data that removes risks while preserving analytical value. As demand for privacy-safe AI grows worldwide, we are excited to share how SynTitan is gaining strong traction across finance, defense, and global enterprise markets.

🔐 Privacy-Preserving Synthetic Data With Real Analytical Power

SynTitan reconstructs enterprise datasets by correcting missing, biased, or imbalanced data and converting them into synthetic versions that maintain meaningful statistical patterns.

Unlike traditional anonymization, which often removes essential attributes and weakens data quality, SynTitan preserves structure, distribution, and contextual relationships. This enables organizations to use the synthetic datasets just like real ones for analytics, modeling, and simulation.

Statistical similarity reaches 93 to 98 percent, which means businesses can obtain reliable insights without handling actual personal information.

This approach significantly reduces legal risk while expanding the scope of data-driven projects that were previously blocked by privacy concerns.

SynTitan is becoming a foundational technology for companies seeking to safely accelerate AI adoption.

🚀 Built on a Non-Access Architecture That Eliminates Exposure

One of SynTitan’s strongest differentiators is its non-access architecture. Original data does not leave the organization, and external operators cannot access it at any stage of processing.

This design is essential for industries such as finance, healthcare, and defense, where security regulations are stringent and compliance risks are high.

By keeping sensitive information confined to a controlled environment while still producing high-quality synthetic datasets, SynTitan enables secure collaboration across business units.

Enterprises can build, test, and deploy AI models without waiting for complex approval steps, dramatically accelerating digital transformation.
For organizations managing high-risk data, SynTitan offers a safe and practical path forward.

🌍 Proven Through 20+ PoC Collaborations in Korea and Abroad

SynTitan has completed more than 20 PoC projects with leading institutions including NH NongHyup Bank, Samsung Securities, and the Korean Air Force.

NH NongHyup Bank, in particular, selected CUBIG through an open innovation program to support AI enhancements in anti-money laundering and risk management workflows.

These collaborations demonstrate that synthetic data is no longer a theoretical concept but a practical and scalable solution for real operational environments.

At global exhibitions, international organizations and enterprises have shown increasing interest in PoC and investment discussions.

A recent example is UK venture capital firm IONASTA, which discovered CUBIG at a Middle East tech event and proceeded with an investment—illustrating SynTitan’s global market potential.

💡 Technical Expertise Driving Global Recognition

CUBIG’s co-CEO Ho Bae brings deep research expertise, spanning computer science and cryptography at UCL, AI security research at Seoul National University, and academic leadership as a professor at Ewha Womans University. Over a decade of research is reflected in SynTitan’s robust architecture and enterprise-ready capabilities.

As a result, the solution resonates strongly in markets with strict privacy regulations, especially across Europe, where GDPR compliance is essential.

CUBIG expects meaningful revenue growth beginning next year, driven primarily by overseas adoption.
The company is now establishing a UK entity to accelerate customer acquisition and strengthen its presence in the region.

📈 Advancing Toward Global Leadership in Privacy-Safe AI

With growing demand for ethical and privacy-preserving AI solutions, CUBIG is positioned to become a global leader in synthetic data technologies.

The company’s combination of synthetic data generation and differential privacy is rare even among global competitors, providing a strong advantage in regulated industries.

CUBIG’s vision is to expand SynTitan into more international markets while pushing forward a future where organizations can use data freely and safely.

By turning advanced research into real-world impact, CUBIG continues to shape the global movement toward trustworthy AI.

📎 Read more

Read the full article(Click)📰

#CUBIG #SynTitan #SyntheticData #AIprivacy #DifferentialPrivacy #EnterpriseAI #FinanceAI #GDPR #DataSecurity #GlobalAI

notes.note: Articles › CUBIG DTS Becomes a New Standard for Public Data Opening 🚀 Safe and AI-Ready Infrastructure for Government Agencies

segment.source: CUBIG DTS Becomes a New Standard for Public Data Opening 🚀 Safe and AI-Ready Infrastructure for Government Agencies
segment.target: CUBIG DTS, 공공 데이터 개방의 새로운 표준 🚀 정부 기관을 위한 안전한 AI-Ready 인프라

segment.source: CUBIG’s DTS enables secure synthetic data generation for high-risk public datasets, helping government agencies safely open and utilize data without exposing sensitive information
segment.target: CUBIG의 DTS는 고위험 공공 데이터셋을 위한 안전한 합성 데이터 생성을 지원하여, 정부 기관이 민감 정보를 노출하지 않고 안전하게 데이터를 개방하고 활용할 수 있도록 합니다

segment.source:
🌱 A New Era of Safe and Smart Public Data Use

CUBIG is pleased to share that DTS, our synthetic data infrastructure solution, is emerging as a key platform for government agencies seeking safe and scalable ways to open public data.

As data-driven administration accelerates, agencies face the challenge of enabling AI innovation while maintaining strict privacy protection. DTS was designed to solve exactly that.


🔐 From Volume to Quality: Shifting Standards in Public Data Opening

In 2025, the Ministry of the Interior and Safety added a new evaluation criterion for agencies that open pseudonymized or synthetic data.

Although more than 102,000 datasets are available on the Public Data Portal, the most valuable datasets—covering resident registration, healthcare, welfare, and civil services—remain closed due to privacy risks.

Government bodies and KISA now highlight synthetic data as the key technology that enables both safe public data opening and AI adoption.


🚀 DTS: A Non-Access Architecture for High-Risk Public Data

DTS ensures that original data stays inside the agency at all times. Built on a Non-Access structure, it prevents external operators from viewing or handling real data while enabling secure transformation into synthetic form.

Differential Privacy is applied to mathematically control re-identification risks. With support for tabular, text, image, and time-series formats through a unified pipeline, DTS is optimized for the diverse nature of public-sector data.


💡 Enabling Public Data Opening, Joint Research, and Cross-Agency Collaboration

By transforming high-risk datasets into synthetic versions, agencies can finally open valuable data on the Public Data Portal, support joint research with private and academic sectors, and enable cross-agency data combination projects.

DTS not only supports compliance with the new evaluation index but also accelerates data-driven policymaking and AI service deployment.


🌍 Expanding Toward Public-Sector Synthetic Data Workspaces

CUBIG has already proven its capabilities through pilot projects in finance, public services, and defense. DTS will continue to expand through integration with SynTitan and SynLake to provide customized synthetic data workspaces for central and municipal government agencies.

CEO Ho Bae emphasized that the goal is not to open more data, but to open it safely in a form that AI can use—setting the stage for expansion into global public-sector markets under GDPR-level regulations.


📎 Read more
Read the full article(Click)📰


#CUBIG #DTS #SyntheticData #PublicData #DataDrivenGovernment #AIprivacy #SynTitan #SynLake #GovTech #DifferentialPrivacy

notes.note: Articles › CUBIG Selected for the 2025 AI Collabo Open Ground 🚀 Advancing Secure LLM Capsule Innovation With DB Insurance

segment.source: CUBIG Selected for the 2025 AI Collabo Open Ground 🚀 Advancing Secure LLM Capsule Innovation With DB Insurance
segment.target: CUBIG, 2025 AI Collabo Open Ground 선정 🚀 DB손해보험과 LLM Capsule 보안 혁신 추진

segment.source: CUBIG has been selected for the 2025 AI Collabo Open Ground program, partnering with DB Insurance to advance secure large-scale data anonymization and GPT utilization through LLM Capsule.
segment.target: CUBIG이 2025 AI Collabo Open Ground 프로그램에 선정되어, DB손해보험과 LLM Capsule을 통한 안전한 대규모 데이터 익명화 및 GPT 활용을 추진합니다.

segment.source:
🌱 Welcome to CUBIG – creating a world where AI innovation stays safe

CUBIG is excited to share that we have been selected as one of six finalists in the 2025 AI Collabo Open Ground program hosted by the Jeju Center for Creative Economy and Innovation. Designed in collaboration with DB Insurance, Chokwang Paint, and Hana Bank, the program aims to accelerate AI-driven innovation through real industry challenges and open collaboration.

🚀 Accelerating Innovation Through Cross-Industry Collaboration

Earlier this year, the participating organizations identified shared AI challenges across insurance, manufacturing, and finance. After multiple offline meetups and technical discussions, six promising startups were chosen as official collaborators for 2025.
The initiative focuses on solving practical problems and developing deployable AI solutions that strengthen each company's digital transformation roadmap.

🤝 CUBIG x DB Insurance: Advancing Secure LLM Capsule

CUBIG will partner with DB Insurance to advance LLM Capsule for large-scale data anonymization and safe GPT utilization.
LLM Capsule acts as a real-time security gateway that detects and anonymizes sensitive information during public LLM use. This ensures that enterprises in highly regulated environments can adopt generative AI without exposing confidential data.
The collaboration will explore secure document processing, summarization, and insurance-specific AI workflows optimized for real operational environments.

💡 Program Timeline and Future Opportunities

All selected startups will work with their matched corporate partners through December to perform technical tests and develop solutions.
Depending on performance, follow-up opportunities such as purchase agreements, investment, and global expansion support may follow. Additional benefits include PoC funding, acceleration programs, global open innovation connections, and Jeju-based workation support designed to enhance creativity and collaboration.

🌍 Building a New AI Innovation Ecosystem in Jeju

The AI Collabo Open Ground represents the first cross-industry collaboration model centered around AI for the Jeju Center. By connecting regional industries with emerging AI companies, the program aims to expand a sustainable innovation ecosystem.
CUBIG is proud to contribute by providing secure, enterprise-ready AI infrastructure that enables organizations to adopt AI responsibly and effectively.


📎 Read more
Read the full article(Click)📰


#CUBIG #LLMCapsule #SyntheticData #OpenInnovation #AIecosystem #DBInsurance #JejuInnovation #EnterpriseAI #DataPrivacy #AITech

notes.note: Articles › CUBIG Leading the Future of High-Performance AI Without Original Data 🚀

segment.source: CUBIG Leading the Future of High-Performance AI Without Original Data 🚀
segment.target: CUBIG, 원본 데이터 없이 고성능 AI의 미래를 선도 🚀

segment.source: CUBIG delivers next-generation synthetic data technologies that enable high-performance AI without accessing sensitive information, driving innovation across finance, healthcare, public services, and defense.
segment.target: CUBIG이 민감 정보에 접근하지 않고 고성능 AI를 실현하는 차세대 합성 데이터 기술을 제공하며, 금융, 헬스케어, 공공 서비스, 국방 분야의 혁신을 주도합니다.

segment.source:
🌱 Welcome to CUBIG – where safe and intelligent data use begins

CUBIG is building a world where organizations can unlock AI innovation without ever exposing sensitive information. With the rise of global data regulations, we are excited to share how our latest technologies are helping industries adopt high-performance AI safely and effectively.


🚀 Unlocking AI Performance Without Accessing Original Data

Many AI systems today rely on only a fraction of available data due to strict privacy rules. CUBIG addresses this limitation with synthetic data that achieves up to 99 percent performance similarity while ensuring that no real personal information is ever accessed.

Our DTS (Data Transform System) generates high-quality multimodal synthetic data including tabular, text, image, and time-series formats, enabling safe AI training and analysis across finance, healthcare, public agencies, and defense.


🤖 SynTitan and LLM Capsule: A New Model of Safe Data Collaboration

SynTitan is CUBIG’s synthetic-data-driven collaboration platform that allows organizations to safely clean, combine, analyze, and share sensitive information internally. With no-code accessibility, anyone can use tools such as analyze data securely.

LLM Capsule acts as a secure AI gateway that detects and anonymizes sensitive information during public LLM usage, ensuring safe AI adoption even in isolated or restricted environments.


🌍 Technology Recognized and Adopted Across Industries

CUBIG has filed eight domestic patents and two international patents while collaborating with major institutions including SK Telecom, Hana Bank, Woori Bank, Naver Cloud, national defense agencies, and leading hospitals. Several projects have completed PoC stages and are progressing toward full deployment.


Our data marketplace, Azoo, also enables companies to generate, trade, and acquire synthetic datasets securely, expanding the possibilities of data-driven business.


💡 Toward Becoming the World’s Leading Synthetic Data Platform

CUBIG is actively expanding into Europe and North America through SEO-driven outreach, global data partnerships, and broader B2B integrations. Our mission is to set a new standard for AI ethics, privacy protection, and practical AI adoption in a world where data cannot be freely shared.


📎 Read more
Read the full article(Click)📰

notes.note: Articles › CUBIG Expands in Jeju 🌱 Leading the Future of Privacy-Safe AI with Secure Synthetic Data

segment.source: CUBIG Expands in Jeju 🌱 Leading the Future of Privacy-Safe AI with Secure Synthetic Data
segment.target: CUBIG, 제주 확장 🌱 안전한 합성 데이터로 프라이버시 안전 AI의 미래를 선도

segment.source: CUBIG is advancing secure synthetic data technologies from its Seoul headquarters and Jeju branch, enabling safe, high-quality data use across finance, healthcare, defense, and other regulated industries.
segment.target: CUBIG이 서울 본사와 제주 지사에서 안전한 합성 데이터 기술을 발전시키며, 금융, 헬스케어, 국방 및 기타 규제 산업에서 안전하고 고품질인 데이터 활용을 제공합니다.

segment.source:
🌱 CUBIG Growing in Jeju’s Innovation Hub

CUBIG is expanding its technological footprint from its Seoul headquarters to its Jeju branch at the Route330 Innovation Center. Jeju’s advanced science park aims to become the Silicon Valley of Korea, and CUBIG is contributing by providing technologies that address one of the nation’s most important challenges: enabling the safe and lawful use of high-quality data in the AI era.

🔐 Turning 12 Percent Usable Data Into 99 Percent Insight

Today’s AI systems often rely on only a small portion of available data because most real-world information contains sensitive elements that cannot be freely processed. CUBIG developed secure synthetic data technology that allows AI learning and analysis without accessing original data, preserving model performance while eliminating privacy risks. This innovation unlocks data hidden behind restrictions and is applicable in fields such as healthcare, finance, statistics, and defense.

🚀 Proven in Real-World Use, Not Just in Concept

CUBIG’s synthetic data models maintain over 99 percent of the performance of real data while providing insights with significantly reduced bias. Its flagship platform, X-PERT, is already used in practical scenarios such as fraud detection in financial institutions, HR simulations, and policy impact forecasting.
With strong momentum, CUBIG has completed a successful Series A round, achieving a cumulative investment of 9 billion KRW. The company holds domestic and international patents, multiple government awards, and partnerships with major organizations including Kyobo Life, IBK Bank, SK Telecom, and public institutions like Gangnam District Office.

🏆 Competing on the Global Stage

CUBIG was selected as the Seoul champion of Startup World Cup 2025 and will represent Korea in the Silicon Valley Grand Finale. The company will also participate in the EWC Championship held in Saudi Arabia, competing among the world’s top 100 AI startups.

CEO Ho Bae shared that CUBIG aims to build a trust-based data ecosystem that protects both citizens and industries, positioning secure synthetic data at the center of future AI innovation.


📎 Read more
Read the full article(Click)📰


#CUBIG #SyntheticData #PrivacyTech #AISecurity #XPERT #JejuRoute330 #AIInnovation #DataProtection #SecureAI #FutureOfData

notes.note: Articles › CUBIG in Tokyo 🇯🇵 Unlocking AI Opportunities in Japan’s Privacy-First Market

segment.source: CUBIG in Tokyo 🇯🇵 Unlocking AI Opportunities in Japan’s Privacy-First Market
segment.target: CUBIG, 도쿄에서 🇯🇵 일본 프라이버시 우선 시장의 AI 기회를 열다

segment.source: CUBIG attended the KDB NextONE Business Meet-up in Tokyo to explore how synthetic data enables safe and practical AI adoption within Japan’s strict privacy regulations.
segment.target: CUBIG이 도쿄에서 개최된 KDB NextONE Business Meet-up에 참석하여, 일본의 엄격한 프라이버시 규정 내에서 합성 데이터가 안전하고 실용적인 AI 도입을 실현하는 방법을 탐색했습니다.

segment.source:
🇯🇵 CUBIG Joins the KDB NextONE Business Meet-up in Tokyo

CUBIG participated in the KDB NextONE Business Meet-up held at Shibuya Scramble Square on October 20, connecting with Japanese enterprises seeking new ways to adopt AI safely. The event gathered ten Korean startups and a broad range of Japanese companies, offering a firsthand look at the challenges created by Japan’s strict data protection rules.

Many organizations expressed the same concern: they want to use AI, but sensitive data cannot leave internal systems or be processed externally. This restriction has slowed or halted many AI initiatives, especially in finance, healthcare, and the public sector. As a result, Japanese companies showed strong interest in methods that allow them to generate insights without exposing real data.


🤝 Conversations That Revealed Real AI Barriers

During pre-arranged discussions, Japanese enterprises visited the CUBIG booth to openly share their obstacles. Some struggled with customer logs that contained sensitive information requiring slow approval processes. Others operated entirely inside isolated networks, making external AI integration nearly impossible.

When CUBIG introduced synthetic data as a way to reflect statistical and contextual patterns without accessing original data, many visitors were intrigued. The idea of performing analysis, prediction, and simulation inside non-export, fully restricted environments resonated strongly with their immediate needs.


💡 What Japanese Companies Need for AI Adoption

Through these conversations, several clear requirements emerged. Japanese organizations need a collaboration model that does not export sensitive information, an AI environment compatible with regulatory demands, simulation capabilities that work when real data is limited, and a fast, low-risk way to validate AI projects internally.

Synthetic data naturally addresses these needs, offering a practical and compliant pathway for AI adoption across Japan’s privacy-first landscape. The meet-up confirmed that synthetic data may serve as the missing foundation that allows Japanese enterprises to move forward with meaningful AI applications.


📸 A Positive Close in Tokyo

The event concluded with a group photo featuring both Korean startups and Japanese partners, capturing an atmosphere of shared optimism. Tokyo made one thing clear: Japan is ready for AI innovation but confined by strict data rules, and synthetic data may be the key that finally unlocks progress.

CUBIG will continue to work with partners in Japan and around the world to provide safe, effective, and future-ready ways to unlock the value of data in the AI era.


📎 Read more

Read the full article(Click)📰


#CUBIG #SyntheticData #SynTitan #DTS #JapanMarket #AIprivacy #EnterpriseAI #KDBNextONE #DataInnovation #PrivacyByDesign

notes.note: Articles › CUBIG CEO Ho Bae: “Secure Synthetic Data Is the Frontline of AI Privacy”

segment.source: CUBIG CEO Ho Bae: “Secure Synthetic Data Is the Frontline of AI Privacy”
segment.target: CUBIG CEO 배호: “안전한 합성 데이터가 AI 프라이버시의 최전선”

segment.source: In an interview with The Economist Korea, CUBIG CEO Ho Bae discusses how secure synthetic data can protect citizens’ data while driving global AI innovation
segment.target: 이코노미스트 코리아 인터뷰에서 CUBIG CEO 배호가 안전한 합성 데이터로 시민 데이터를 보호하면서 글로벌 AI 혁신을 추진하는 방법을 논의합니다

segment.source:
🧠 CUBIG CEO Ho Bae: “Secure Synthetic Data Is the Frontline of AI Privacy”

Hello, we’re CUBIG, a leading company in synthetic data and AI privacy innovation.

In a recent interview with The Economist Korea, our CEO Ho Bae shared how CUBIG is building the “AI privacy vaccine” — a technology that protects citizens’ data while fueling global AI innovation.


📰 Redefining Privacy in the AI Era

As AI grows more powerful, the risk of personal data exposure increases dramatically.

CUBIG’s Secure Synthetic Data technology enables AI systems to learn and operate without ever accessing real-world data.

By generating high-fidelity synthetic datasets that mirror real distributions, CUBIG empowers organizations to innovate freely without compromising privacy or compliance.

“Traditionally, people believed stronger privacy meant lower performance,” said Bae.
“Our mission was to prove that you can have both — protection and productivity.”

This philosophy positions CUBIG as Asia’s most advanced AI privacy innovator.


🌍 Recognized by Gartner as a Global Innovator

In 2025, global research firm Gartner named CUBIG the only Asian vendor featured in its report, “Emerging Tech: Hyper-Synthetic Data.”

Hyper-synthetic data combines domain-specific simulation, AI analytics, and built-in privacy protection — the next-generation foundation for safe and scalable AI.

Gartner predicts that by 2028, 80% of all AI data will be synthetic.

CUBIG’s technology is trusted by leading institutions such as Samsung, Naver Cloud, Kyobo Life, IBK Bank, and multiple government agencies, bridging the gap between strict data regulations and AI-driven innovation.


🧑‍💼 “AI Privacy Is National Infrastructure”

“Many global platforms still use personal data for AI training,” said Bae.
“At CUBIG, we see protecting citizens’ data as a national responsibility — standing on the frontline of AI privacy for the people of Korea.”

CUBIG’s flagship solutions — LLM Capsule (for real-time data anonymization) and DTS (Data Transform System) (for privacy-preserving AI learning) — demonstrate one clear principle:
trust is the true foundation of AI innovation.


✈️ Expanding Across the Globe

CUBIG was named the Seoul Winner of Startup World Cup 2025, earning the chance to compete in the Grand Finale in Silicon Valley.

The company will also represent Korea at the EWC 2025 in Saudi Arabia, joining the world’s top 100 AI startups.

With ₩9 billion (USD 6.5M) in total funding and a new UK subsidiary, CUBIG is expanding across Europe and North America 🌍, positioning itself as a global leader in AI privacy and synthetic data technology.


💡 From Protection to Trust

“As AI continues to evolve, trust in data will define the strength of nations,” said Bae.
“At CUBIG, we don’t just protect information — we build the foundation of AI privacy.”

CUBIG remains committed to creating a world where AI innovation and privacy coexist, empowering progress through trust.


#CUBIG #AISyntheticData #AIPrivacy #HyperSyntheticData #StartupWorldCup #TrustedAI #DataIntegrity #AIInnovation


📎 Read more
Read the full article(Click)📰

segment.source: 🏛️ CUBIG Joins Policy Roundtable on “Global Scale-Up for AI Startups
segment.target: 🏛️ CUBIG, “AI 스타트업 글로벌 스케일업” 정책 라운드테이블 참여

segment.source: CUBIG participated in a National Assembly roundtable to address regulatory challenges and advocate for clearer policies on synthetic data adoption
segment.target: CUBIG이 국회 라운드테이블에 참여하여 합성 데이터 도입에 관한 규제 과제 해결과 명확한 정책 수립을 촉구했습니다

segment.source:
🏛️ CUBIG Joins Policy Roundtable on “Global Scale-Up for AI Startups”

Hello, we are CUBIG, a leader in synthetic data and AI security.

On September 16, we participated in a roundtable co-hosted by Korea Startup Forum (KOSPO) and the National Assembly Startup Research Group Unicorn Farm.

The session gathered lawmakers and leading AI startups to discuss regulatory and policy challenges hindering global scale-up

🔐 CUBIG’s Key Message

Our CEO, Minchan Chung, emphasized the need to legally define synthetic data as an independent secondary output — not a derivative of personal information.

Current policies encourage data use but restrict the free distribution of synthetic data, creating contradictions.

By establishing a clear legal framework ⚖️, synthetic data can be safely adopted across sensitive industries like healthcare 🏥, finance 💰, and public services 🏛️


📌 Why This Matters

The discussion highlighted that startups are not just beneficiaries but key drivers of innovation.

With targeted policies — such as:

  • easing cross-border data regulations 🌍

  • creating supportive tax benefits 💡

  • enabling sovereign fund investments 💵

— Korea’s AI startups can accelerate their global expansion.

CUBIG remains committed to contributing to policy dialogues and providing technologies like synthetic data and LLM Capsule to help enterprises and governments safely embrace AI innovation worldwide


📎 Read more
Read the full article(Click)📰


#CUBIG #SyntheticData #KOSPO #AIStartups #GlobalScaleUp #AIInnovation #Policy

notes.note: Articles › 💰 CUBIG Secures Series A Funding from Iona Star, Accelerating Global Expansion

segment.source: 💰 CUBIG Secures Series A Funding from Iona Star, Accelerating Global Expansion
segment.target: 💰 CUBIG, Iona Star로부터 시리즈 A 투자 유치, 글로벌 확장 가속

segment.source: CUBIG raises Series A funding from Iona Star LP and Friend Investment Partners, surpassing KRW 9B and advancing global expansion into Europe and North America
segment.target: CUBIG이 Iona Star LP와 프렌드투자파트너스로부터 시리즈 A 투자를 유치하여 누적 90억 원을 돌파하고, 유럽 및 북미 글로벌 확장을 가속합니다

segment.source:
💰 CUBIG Secures Series A Funding from Iona Star, Accelerating Global Expansion

Hello, we are CUBIG, a pioneer in AI security and synthetic data.

We’re excited to share that CUBIG has raised Series A funding from UK-based Iona Star LP and Korea’s Friend Investment Partners, bringing our cumulative funding to KRW 9 billion.

Beyond capital, this round represents a strategic partnership to accelerate our entry into Europe and North America 🌍


🚀 Differential Privacy Meets Synthetic Data

CUBIG’s core innovation combines differential privacy with synthetic data, enabling AI training and analysis without ever exposing raw data.

Original datasets remain local, while only synthetic candidates are shared back — ensuring that sensitive information never leaves the owner’s environment.

This “learning without seeing the data” approach addresses one of the biggest bottlenecks in AI adoption and empowers organizations across finance 💳, healthcare 🏥, and government 🏛️ to safely leverage their data.


🔐 X-PERT: Real-World Applications

Our flagship platform, X-PERT, supports multimodal, domainless synthetic data — including text, tables, images 🖼️, and time-series.

It helps balance skewed datasets, augment rare events such as fraud detection in finance, and enables predictive simulations for HR or policy scenarios.

By safely integrating with LLMs 🤖, X-PERT enhances AI performance while maintaining compliance.

As a field-proven solution, X-PERT goes beyond demo-stage technology and is already used in mission-critical environments.

✈️ Global Expansion and Vision

With this investment, CUBIG will:

  • Establish overseas subsidiaries starting in the UK

  • Prioritize go-to-market strategies for Europe

  • Strengthen sales and marketing capabilities

  • Secure top talent 👩‍💻👨‍💻

Recognized with multiple patents, GS certifications, and government awards, CUBIG already partners with Kyobo Life, IBK Bank, and Gangnam District Office.

Our vision is to lead the global data governance market as a trusted data infrastructure company.


📎 Read more
Read the full article(Click)📰


#CUBIG #SyntheticData #SeriesA #DataInfrastructure #AISecurity #GDPR #GlobalExpansion

notes.note: Articles › 🔐 CUBIG Launches ‘LLM Capsule’ Security Filter for Safe Enterprise Use of LLMs

segment.source: 🔐 CUBIG Launches ‘LLM Capsule’ Security Filter for Safe Enterprise Use of LLMs
segment.target: 🔐 CUBIG, 안전한 기업 LLM 사용을 위한 'LLM Capsule' 보안 필터 출시

segment.source: CUBIG launches LLM Capsule, an AI security filter that protects sensitive data while enabling safe and efficient enterprise adoption of large language models
segment.target: CUBIG이 대규모 언어 모델의 안전하고 효율적인 기업 도입을 지원하면서 민감 데이터를 보호하는 AI 보안 필터 LLM Capsule을 출시했습니다

segment.source:
🔐 CUBIG Launches ‘LLM Capsule’ Security Filter for Safe Enterprise Use of LLMs

Hello, we are CUBIG, a leader in AI security and synthetic data solutions.

We’re excited to announce the launch of LLM Capsule — an AI security filter that enables enterprises to safely adopt and use large language models (LLMs).

By automatically detecting and pseudonymizing sensitive information, LLM Capsule prevents data leaks while maintaining real-time performance ⚡ for seamless collaboration.

🔐 Unmatched Security for Enterprise AI

Since its founding, CUBIG has applied Differential Privacy to ensure synthetic data generation without exposing personal information.

Building on this foundation, LLM Capsule extends our security expertise to enterprise LLM environments.

Whether using ChatGPT, Gemini, or Grok 🤖, organizations can rely on LLM Capsule as a secure gateway — eliminating the need for expensive standalone deployments.


🚀 Next-Generation Security Architecture

LLM Capsule goes beyond rule-based protection.

It leverages AI-driven contextual understanding to detect threats, integrates RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) and SLLM (Self-contained LLM) to minimize risks, and delivers 0.09-second decryption speeds.

This design overturns the notion that “security slows productivity” by ensuring enterprises can maintain both protection and efficiency.


✈️ Global Showcase at AWS Tech Summit

CUBIG will officially present LLM Capsule as a partner at the 2025 AWS Tech Summit (Sept 9–10), highlighting our technology to a global audience.

CEO Ho Bae emphasized:

“LLM Capsule fulfills government security guidelines while giving enterprises the confidence to adopt productivity AI securely.”

With this launch, CUBIG strengthens its leadership in AI privacy and security on the global stage.


📎 Read more
Read the full article(Click)📰


#CUBIG #AISecurity #SyntheticData #AWS #ProductivityAI #DataPrivacy #AIInnovation

notes.note: Articles › 💰 CUBIG Secures Series A Funding, Surpasses KRW 9 Billion in Total Investment

segment.source: 💰 CUBIG Secures Series A Funding, Surpasses KRW 9 Billion in Total Investment
segment.target: 💰 CUBIG, 시리즈 A 투자 유치, 누적 투자 90억 원 돌파

segment.source: CUBIG raises Series A funding, surpassing KRW 9B in total investment, to accelerate global expansion and strengthen its synthetic data ecosystem
segment.target: CUBIG이 시리즈 A 투자를 유치하여 누적 90억 원을 돌파하고, 글로벌 확장과 합성 데이터 생태계 강화를 가속합니다

segment.source:
💰 CUBIG Secures Series A Funding, Surpasses KRW 9 Billion in Total Investment

Hello, we are CUBIG, a leading company in AI security and synthetic data solutions.

We’re excited to announce that CUBIG has successfully closed its Series A round, bringing our total investment to over KRW 9 billion.

The round was co-led by UK-based Iona Star LP and Korea’s Friend Investment Partners, reflecting strong confidence in our technology and global growth potential.

🚀 Why This Investment Matters

This funding validates that CUBIG’s technology and business model can thrive in the global market.

In particular, our differential privacy-based synthetic data platform is recognized as a unique solution in regions with stringent data regulations such as Europe’s GDPR.

Beyond capital, the investment represents a strategic partnership to accelerate our entry into Europe and North America.


🔐 CUBIG’s Core Product and Strengths

Our flagship product, X-PERT, is a no-code AI platform that generates and simulates multimodal synthetic data without accessing real data.

It has already been adopted by leading domestic clients such as Kyobo Life, IBK Bank, and Gangnam-gu Office.

With upcoming deployment on NAVER Cloud, we are expanding to SaaS-based services.

By covering the full cycle — generation, validation, trading, and application, CUBIG provides an integrated data ecosystem that maximizes customer value.


✈️ Global Expansion and Vision

The Series A proceeds will be invested in:

  • Establishing overseas entities in key markets like the UK

  • Strengthening sales and marketing capabilities

  • Securing top talent 👩‍💻👨‍💻

We will also develop industry-specific AI agent models tailored for finance, public sector, and healthcare, while building a global infrastructure for secure and efficient AI data usage.

As CUBIG advances into Europe and North America 🌍, we remain committed to becoming a world-class AI data infrastructure company, empowering enterprises worldwide with safe and innovative synthetic data solutions.


📎 Read more
Read the full article(Click)📰


#CUBIG #SeriesA #Funding #SyntheticData #GDPR #AISecurity #XPERT #GlobalExpansion

notes.note: Articles › 🌍 CUBIG Recognized by Gartner as a Representative Vendor in Hyper-Synthetic Data

segment.source: 🌍 CUBIG Recognized by Gartner as a Representative Vendor in Hyper-Synthetic Data
segment.target: 🌍 CUBIG, Gartner 초합성 데이터 분야 대표 벤더로 선정

segment.source: CUBIG has been listed by Gartner as a representative vendor in Hyper-Synthetic Data, the only Asia-based company included in the 2025 report
segment.target: CUBIG이 Gartner의 초합성 데이터 분야 대표 벤더로 선정되었으며, 아시아 기업 중 유일하게 2025 보고서에 포함되었습니다

segment.source:
🌍 CUBIG Recognized by Gartner as a Representative Vendor in Hyper-Synthetic Data

Hello, we are CUBIG, a leading company in secure synthetic data technologies.

We are proud to announce that CUBIG has been listed as a representative vendor in the Hyper-Synthetic Data category in Gartner’s latest report:
“Emerging Tech: Provider Differentiation Strategy–Trends for Hyper-Synthetic Data” (June 2025).

Notably, CUBIG is the only Asia-based company to be included, underscoring both our technical strength and proven performance.



🌍 The Meaning of Hyper-Synthetic Data

According to Gartner, hyper-synthetic data goes beyond simple generated data to include domain-specific simulations, AI analytics, and built-in privacy protection.

The report predicts that by 2028, 80% of AI training data will be synthetic.

CUBIG was recognized for providing an integrated infrastructure that supports high-precision use cases such as strategic decision-making, medical trials 🏥, and financial policy design 💰 — all without accessing sensitive information.


🔐 CUBIG’s Differentiation and Strengths

CUBIG’s multimodal and domainless synthetic data technology supports text, tabular, image 🖼️, and time-series formats.

By embedding Differential Privacy, we ensure end-to-end security throughout the generation process.

Our platform also generates AI agents capable of GPT-level analysis 🤖, while security filtering at the input stage blocks personal or confidential information in public LLMs.

These strengths make CUBIG’s solutions highly applicable for regulated sectors such as finance, healthcare, and defense.


✈️ Global Expansion and Vision

Gartner highlighted CUBIG’s maturity as an integrated solution and emphasized its scalability in regulated industries.

CEO Ho Bae stated:

“This listing is not just a certification but an official validation of CUBIG’s capabilities on a global standard. We will accelerate expansion into Europe and North America and strengthen global partnerships.”

With this recognition, CUBIG expects to leverage new opportunities in government procurement, corporate open innovation, and international investment.


📎 Read more
Read the full article(Click)📰


#CUBIG #SyntheticData #Gartner #HyperSyntheticData #AISecurity #PrivacyTech #FutureOfAI

notes.note: Articles › 🏛️ LLM Capsule Selected as Public Procurement Innovation Product, Expanding CUBIG’s Reach into the Public Sector

segment.source: 🏛️ LLM Capsule Selected as Public Procurement Innovation Product, Expanding CUBIG’s Reach into the Public Sector
segment.target: 🏛️ LLM Capsule, 조달청 혁신제품 지정으로 CUBIG의 공공 부문 진출 확대

segment.source: CUBIG’s LLM Capsule has been designated a 2025 Innovation Product by Korea’s Public Procurement Service, enabling secure AI adoption across government institutions.
segment.target: CUBIG의 LLM Capsule이 2025년 조달청 혁신제품으로 지정되어, 정부 기관에서의 안전한 AI 도입을 지원합니다.

segment.source:
🏛️ LLM Capsule Selected as Public Procurement Innovation Product, Expanding CUBIG’s Reach into the Public Sector

We are pleased to announce that our flagship product, LLM Capsule, has been designated as a 2025 Innovation Product by the Public Procurement Service (PPS) of Korea.

Following its earlier selection for the SME Technology Pilot Purchase Program, this recognition underscores CUBIG’s technical excellence and innovation at the national level.

🔐 Technical Superiority of LLM Capsule

LLM Capsule automatically detects and de-identifies sensitive information contained in user inputs to public LLMs like ChatGPT, preventing external leakage at the source.

Designed as a local security agent, it operates seamlessly even in network-separated environments, safeguarding data directly on users’ computing devices without relying on external servers.

This makes it highly suitable for sensitive government and public institution settings.


⚙️ Differential Privacy for Security and Usability

Built with Differential Privacy (DP), LLM Capsule employs pseudonymization and restoration functions.

Only de-identified data is transmitted externally, while the original meaning can be restored internally, ensuring both strong security 🔒 and practical usability.

This allows public institutions to securely leverage generative AI for tasks such as report writing 📝, civil service responses, and internal document management.


📌 Accelerating Public Sector Expansion

Once designated as an Innovation Product, public institutions can directly purchase LLM Capsule via the government’s procurement platform, with eligibility for sole-source contracts for three years.

This framework significantly lowers adoption barriers for innovative solutions.

According to CUBIG:

“LLM Capsule is the only solution that ensures safe use of generative AI in network-separated environments, reducing risks of sensitive information leakage.”

Moving forward, CUBIG will continue to advance AI innovation and data protection with our broader portfolio, including Synflow (data integration), Syndata (data validation), DTS (synthetic data generation), and Azoo (data marketplace).


📎 Read more
Read the full article(Click)📰


#CUBIG #PublicProcurement #AISecurity #SyntheticData #GovTech #DifferentialPrivacy #AIInnovation

notes.note: Articles › 🏆 CUBIG Wins Startup World Cup Seoul Finals, Heads to Silicon Valley Grand Finale

segment.source: 🏆 CUBIG Wins Startup World Cup Seoul Finals, Heads to Silicon Valley Grand Finale
segment.target: 🏆 CUBIG, Startup World Cup 서울 결선 우승, 실리콘밸리 그랜드 파이널 진출

segment.source: CUBIG wins the Seoul regional finals of the Startup World Cup 2025, advancing to the global Grand Finale in Silicon Valley this October
segment.target: CUBIG이 Startup World Cup 2025 서울 지역 결선에서 우승하여 올해 10월 실리콘밸리 글로벌 그랜드 파이널에 진출합니다

segment.source:
🏆 CUBIG Wins Startup World Cup Seoul Finals, Heads to Silicon Valley Grand Finale

Hello, we are CUBIG, a leading company in secure synthetic data solutions.

We are thrilled to announce that CUBIG has won the Startup World Cup 2025 Seoul regional finals, earning the opportunity to compete in the global Grand Finale this October in Silicon Valley


🌍 What Is the Startup World Cup?

The Startup World Cup, sponsored by Pegasus Tech Ventures, is one of the largest startup pitch competitions worldwide.

Marking its 10th year, the event brings together 50,000+ attendees, 2,500 investors, and 500 speakers each year.

Competing for a grand prize of $1 million 💰, winning the Seoul finals highlights CUBIG’s technological excellence and global growth potential


🔐 CUBIG’s Innovation and Expertise

Founded in 2021, CUBIG develops next-generation data solutions that enable high-performance AI training without exposing personal data.

Our core technologies include:

  • DTS — a multimodal and domainless synthetic data generator

  • DataXpert — a synthetic data-based agent platform

  • LLM Capsule — a privacy-preserving solution preventing sensitive data leakage in public LLMs

These solutions are tailored for high-risk industries such as finance 💳, healthcare 🏥, defense 🛡️, and government 🏛️


✈️ On the Road to Silicon Valley

With the global Grand Finale scheduled for October 15–17 in Silicon Valley, CUBIG is preparing to showcase achievements on the international stage.

CEO Ho Bae stated:

“We saw the Startup World Cup as the fastest path to entering the U.S. market, and we will focus on expanding our technologies and services globally.”

CUBIG remains committed to driving secure and innovative AI ecosystems, building global trust together with our partners and customers.


📎 Read more
Read the full article(Click)📰


#CUBIG #StartupWorldCup #SyntheticData #SiliconValley #AIPrivacy #GlobalExpansion

notes.note: Articles › 🏆 CUBIG’s DTS Wins User Excellence at Human Technology Awards

segment.source: 🏆 CUBIG’s DTS Wins User Excellence at Human Technology Awards
segment.target: 🏆 CUBIG DTS, 휴먼테크놀로지어워드 사용자 우수상 수상

segment.source: CUBIG’s DTS earns the User Excellence Award at the Human Technology Awards, recognized for secure, high-quality synthetic data generation without raw access
segment.target: CUBIG의 DTS가 원본 접근 없이 안전하고 고품질인 합성 데이터를 생성한 공로를 인정받아 휴먼테크놀로지어워드 사용자 우수상을 수상했습니다

segment.source:
🏆 CUBIG’s DTS Wins User Excellence at Human Technology Awards

Hello, we are CUBIG, the team behind DTS — an accessible, secure platform for generating high-quality synthetic data.

We’re pleased to share that DTS received the User Excellence Award at the 10th Human Technology Awards.

This recognition highlights our ability to reconcile two competing goals — privacy protection 🔐 and AI advancement 🤖 — while enabling real-time creation of analysis-ready datasets without touching raw data.

With both web and on-prem options, DTS fits security-sensitive organizations that must keep data within internal boundaries.

🚀 Solving the Privacy–AI Trade-off with Synthetic Data

DTS generates realistic datasets that preserve the statistical properties and distributions 📊 of source data — without direct access to the originals.

Non-developers can create and use datasets via simple, mouse-driven interactions 🖱️ and immediately feed them into analytics and model training.

This design lowers adoption barriers in regulated environments while improving data accessibility, model quality, and security posture.

As a result, teams accelerate AI initiatives and reduce risks in handling sensitive information.


🧩 Proven Impact Across Real-World Use Cases

CUBIG’s technology has been validated in high-risk settings, including a pilot with the Air Force ✈️ where exports are restricted.

Collaborations with NAVER and SK Telecom demonstrate practical value in privacy-safe data sharing, vendor collaboration, and AI training.

Synthetic data serves as a bridge between compliance and innovation, delivering analysis outcomes without weakening internal controls.

Adoption is expanding across industries as organizations establish synthetic data as a new operational standard.


🌱 Advancing the Product Ecosystem and Global Reach

Beyond DTS, CUBIG is building a broader stack:

  • azoo: A no-code synthetic data platform.

  • Dedicated privacy services: Covering images 🖼️ and text 📄.

These offerings connect the end-to-end data journey — generation, combination, validation, and protection — to maximize customer value.

Market recognition such as the NextRise Global Innovator Award and active expansion into U.S. finance/healthcare 💰🏥 and Europe 🌍 further reinforce our trajectory.


We will continue advancing practical innovations that raise both security and productivity.


📎 Read more
Read the full article(Click)📰


#CUBIG #DTS #SyntheticData #HumanTechnologyAwards #AISecurity #PrivacyTech #DataProtection

segment.target: CUBIG이 프라이버시 우선 합성 데이터 인프라와 글로벌 성장 잠재력을 인정받아 Global ICT Future Unicorn 2025 프로그램에 선정되었습니다

segment.source:
🌍 CUBIG Selected for Korea’s “Global ICT Future Unicorn (ICT GROWTH) 2025”

CUBIG has been selected for the Ministry of Science and ICT and NIPA’s flagship program, Global ICT Future Unicorn (ICT GROWTH) 2025.

Designed to help high-potential ICT companies scale globally, this year’s cohort highlights innovators across AI, healthcare, and data solutions.

🏗️ Full-Stack AI Data Infrastructure

CUBIG provides a full-stack synthetic data infrastructure covering generation, validation, analytics, monetization, and AI agents — all without exposing personal or sensitive information.

Our flagship DTS (Data Transform System) combines Non-Access architecture with Differential Privacy 🔐, generating high-utility synthetic data across multimodal and domainless use cases without touching raw data.


🌐 Expanding Real-World Impact

Across highly regulated sectors — finance 💰, healthcare 🏥, public, and defense 🛡️ — CUBIG has validated its technology through PoCs.

  • DataXpert: Enables no-code AI agent building on synthetic data.

  • azoo: Powers a marketplace and end-to-end ecosystem for combining, validating, and transacting datasets.

  • LLM Capsule: Filters sensitive information on-device for safer adoption of public LLMs.


🚀 Accelerating Global Expansion

Backed by this selection, CUBIG will accelerate international partnerships and market entry, advancing a privacy-first data ecosystem 🌍 that unlocks AI innovation without compromise.


📎 Read more
Read the full article(Click)📰


#CUBIG #GlobalICTUnicorn #ICTGROWTH #SyntheticData #DifferentialPrivacy #DTS #DataXpert #azoo

notes.note: Articles › 🏛️ CUBIG Supports Public Institutions with Synthetic Data Compliance Solution

segment.source: 🏛️ CUBIG Supports Public Institutions with Synthetic Data Compliance Solution
segment.target: 🏛️ CUBIG, 합성 데이터 컴플라이언스 솔루션으로 공공 기관 지원

segment.source: CUBIG introduces DTS to help public institutions meet new compliance standards, enabling secure synthetic data generation without exposing sensitive records
segment.target: CUBIG이 공공 기관의 새로운 컴플라이언스 기준 충족을 지원하는 DTS를 도입하여, 민감 기록 노출 없이 안전한 합성 데이터 생성을 실현합니다

segment.source:
🏛️ CUBIG Supports Public Institutions with Synthetic Data Compliance Solution

CUBIG has introduced its Data Transform System (DTS) to help public institutions in Korea meet the newly revised government evaluation framework, which now includes “synthetic data openness performance” as a key metric.

This move comes as agencies are required to generate and share synthetic datasets without exposing sensitive original data.

Addressing the Challenges of Public Sector Data Compliance ⚖️

Generating synthetic data typically requires AI expertise, security design, and advanced infrastructure — resources many public institutions lack.

Outsourcing or cloud-based generation is often restricted due to security concerns.

CUBIG’s DTS solves this with its Non-Access technology 🔐, enabling secure transformation of text, tables, documents, and images into high-quality synthetic data without ever touching the raw data.


Easy Deployment and Enhanced Productivity ⚡

With a user-friendly GUI, DTS can be used without dedicated developers and is compatible with closed-network (air-gapped) environments.

It also integrates with GPT and RAG-based analysis tools 🤖, helping public institutions not only meet compliance metrics but also drive digital transformation and administrative automation.


CUBIG is currently offering consulting and pilot programs tailored to government agencies, ensuring smooth adoption and measurable results.

By deploying DTS, institutions can simultaneously achieve compliance, improve AI adoption, and modernize public administration.


📎 Read more
Read the full article(Click)📰


#CUBIG #SyntheticData #DTS #AISecurity #PublicSectorAI #DigitalTransformation #GovTech

notes.note: Articles › 🏆 CUBIG Wins “AI Medical Innovation Award” at AI EXPO KOREA 2025

segment.source: 🏆 CUBIG Wins “AI Medical Innovation Award” at AI EXPO KOREA 2025
segment.target: 🏆 CUBIG, AI EXPO KOREA 2025 'AI 의료 혁신상' 수상

segment.source: CUBIG receives the AI Medical Innovation Award at AI EXPO KOREA 2025, recognized for advancing healthcare AI with Differential Privacy-based synthetic data.
segment.target: CUBIG이 차분 프라이버시 기반 합성 데이터로 헬스케어 AI 발전에 기여한 공로를 인정받아 AI EXPO KOREA 2025 AI 의료 혁신상을 수상했습니다.

segment.source:
🏆 CUBIG Wins “AI Medical Innovation Award” at AI EXPO KOREA 2025

We’re proud to share that CUBIG has been awarded the AI Medical Innovation Award at the 2025 AI Excellence Summit, held during AI EXPO KOREA 2025 in Seoul.

This recognition highlights our breakthrough in addressing one of the most critical challenges in healthcare AI: balancing patient data security 🔐 with meaningful data utilization.

📊 Differential Privacy at the Core

At the heart of CUBIG’s technology is a Differential Privacy-based synthetic data engine.

This approach mathematically transforms sensitive patient data, preserving statistical value for AI training while ensuring that individual information can never be inferred.

It goes far beyond traditional de-identification or anonymization, setting a new global standard 🌍 for safe medical data use.


🧬 Unlocking Multimodal Healthcare Data

CUBIG’s solution enables the integration and analysis of multimodal medical data — including images 🩻, clinical text 📄, and numerical records 📊.

By leveraging synthetic personas that retain key patient characteristics, our technology empowers applications in clinical research, drug development, and precision medicine.


💡 Driving AI Transformation in Healthcare

This award reaffirms CUBIG’s role as a key enabler of AI transformation across the pharmaceutical and biotech industries.

From disease pattern analysis to treatment response prediction and virtual patient simulations, our synthetic data technology makes what was once impossible with traditional methods now achievable.


📎 Read more
Read the full article(Click)📰


#CUBIG #SyntheticData #DifferentialPrivacy #HealthcareAI #AIMedicalInnovation #AIEXPO2025 #PrecisionMedicine

notes.note: Articles › 🔐 Strengthening AI Security: CUBIG’s Synthetic Data and LLM Capsule

segment.source: 🔐 Strengthening AI Security: CUBIG’s Synthetic Data and LLM Capsule
segment.target: 🔐 AI 보안 강화: CUBIG의 합성 데이터와 LLM Capsule

segment.source: CUBIG enhances AI security with DTS and LLM Capsule, combining privacy-preserving synthetic data and real-time filtering to protect sensitive information.
segment.target: CUBIG이 DTS와 LLM Capsule로 AI 보안을 강화하며, 프라이버시 보존 합성 데이터와 실시간 필터링을 결합하여 민감 정보를 보호합니다.

segment.source:
🔐 Strengthening AI Security: CUBIG’s Synthetic Data and LLM Capsule

Concerns over Large Language Model (LLM) security are rapidly growing.

Recent cases — such as DeepSeek’s AI model being banned in certain countries and OpenAI’s data collection practices — highlight the risks of data breaches 🔓, unauthorized storage, and hidden backdoors.

This poses a serious threat to both enterprises and individual users.


⚠️ Why Stronger AI Security Is Needed

While some companies are attempting to build their own secure LLMs, this is not a complete solution.

  • Sensitive training data can still be exposed.

  • Backdoor attacks may compromise even private models.

What’s needed is a comprehensive approach 🛡️ that protects not only the models but also the data they learn from.


🛠️ CUBIG’s Solutions: DTS and LLM Capsule

CUBIG addresses these challenges with two core technologies:

  • DTS (Data Transform System): Generates privacy-preserving synthetic data that retains up to 99% of the utility of the original dataset while removing sensitive information.

  • LLM Capsule: Acts as a security filter 🔍, detecting and anonymizing personal information at the input stage — ensuring safe AI chatbot usage for both enterprises and individuals.

🤝 Building Trust in AI

Users must adopt a more cautious mindset:

  • Avoid inputting sensitive data 🔒 into AI services.

  • Review data collection and storage policies.

  • Implement protective tools like CUBIG’s LLM Capsule.

By combining secure synthetic data with real-time filtering, CUBIG is helping shape a safer AI ecosystem where privacy is never compromised.


📎 Read more
Read the full article(Click)📰


#CUBIG #SyntheticData #DifferentialPrivacy #DTS #LLMCapsule #AISecurity #DataPrivacy #AIInnovation
