notes.note: Articles › 🚀 CUBIG Ranked Top 10 at COMEUP Stars 2024

segment.source: 🚀 CUBIG Ranked Top 10 at COMEUP Stars 2024
CUBIG was named among the Top 10 startups at COMEUP Stars 2024, recognized for its differential privacy-powered synthetic data innovation.
segment.target: CUBIG이 차분 프라이버시 기반 합성 데이터 혁신을 인정받아 COMEUP Stars 2024 Top 10 스타트업에 선정되었습니다.

segment.source:
🚀 CUBIG Ranked Top 10 at COMEUP Stars 2024

We’re thrilled to share that CUBIG has been named one of the Top 10 startups at COMEUP 2024, Korea’s largest global startup festival, selected among 1,208 teams.

In just 16 months since its early-stage debut, CUBIG has grown into a key player recognized on the international stage 🌍


🔐 Solving the Data Privacy Dilemma

CUBIG’s differential privacy-based synthetic data technology allows enterprises to utilize sensitive data without exposing the original records

By introducing statistical noise 📊, our solutions block re-identification risks while preserving the utility of the data

This makes CUBIG a powerful enabler for safe and compliant AI training under stringent regulations such as GDPR


🌍 Global Traction and Investor Interest

Following a year-long Proof-of-Concept with Naver Cloud, CUBIG is now moving toward commercialization.

We are also seeing strong interest from global enterprises in Europe and the U.S. ✈️, as well as oversubscribed investor demand.

CUBIG is not only addressing the AI training data shortage but also unlocking previously unusable datasets across industries.


🏬 Our Vision: The Data Department Store

Beyond AI training, CUBIG aspires to become a “data department store” 🏪 — a place where organizations can freely and securely leverage data once locked away by regulation.

By innovating how sensitive data is utilized, we aim to reshape the global data ecosystem.


📎 Read more
Read the full article(Click)📰


#CUBIG #SyntheticData #DifferentialPrivacy #DTS #COMEUP2024 #AIInnovation #DataPrivacy #GlobalStartup

notes.note: Articles › 🏦 CUBIG Selected for IBK “1st LAB” 6th Cohort

segment.source: 🏦 CUBIG Selected for IBK “1st LAB” 6th Cohort
CUBIG has been chosen as one of five companies to join IBK’s open innovation program “1st LAB,” collaborating on AI, RPA, and big data solutions for banking innovation.
segment.target: CUBIG이 IBK의 오픈 이노베이션 프로그램 '1st LAB'에 5개사 중 하나로 선정되어 은행 혁신을 위한 AI, RPA, 빅데이터 솔루션을 공동 개발합니다.

segment.source:
🏦 CUBIG Selected for IBK “1st LAB” 6th Cohort

IBK Industrial Bank of Korea (IBK) has announced the five companies chosen for the 6th cohort of its open innovation testbed program, “IBK 1st LAB.”

The program provides a platform to experiment with and verify whether external digital innovation technologies can be applied to IBK’s products, services, and processes


🤝 Open Innovation Testbed

Through IBK 1st LAB, selected companies collaborate with IBK to address internal banking challenges using AI, RPA, and big data technologies.

Each participant receives testing funds, dedicated collaboration space, and IT infrastructure support.

For top-performing companies, additional benefits include commercialization support grants, office space, and participation in Demo Day events (Impact Dive)


🌟 6th Cohort Selection

Following document review and interviews, IBK selected five companies for this year’s program:

  • CG Inside – AI specialized in legal and regulatory compliance

  • CUBIG – Provider of secure synthetic data solutions 🔐

  • Filer – AI-powered brand safety for advertising

  • GNE Tech Holdings – Risk and asset management solutions

  • GMission – Generative AI solutions


📎 Read more
Read the full article(Click)📰


#CUBIG #SyntheticData #IBK #OpenInnovation #AIInnovation #1stLAB #RPA #BigData

notes.note: Articles › 🏆 CUBIG’s DTS Wins 2024 Information Security Innovation Award

segment.source: 🏆 CUBIG’s DTS Wins 2024 Information Security Innovation Award
CUBIG’s DTS receives the 2024 Information Security Innovation Award, recognized for enabling secure synthetic data generation with strong privacy and usability
segment.target: CUBIG의 DTS가 강력한 프라이버시와 활용성을 갖춘 안전한 합성 데이터 생성 기술을 인정받아 2024 정보보안 혁신상을 수상했습니다

segment.source:
🏆 CUBIG’s DTS Wins 2024 Information Security Innovation Award


We are proud to announce that CUBIG’s DTS (Data Transform System) has been awarded at the 2024 Information Security Product Innovation Awards.

DTS is a synthetic data solution that enables enterprises to generate data locally without transmitting sensitive information to external servers 🔐 — achieving up to 99% performance similarity ⚡ to the original data while ensuring privacy and security.


Why DTS Matters 💡

DTS overcomes regulatory barriers ⚖️ that often restrict data usage, empowering organizations to harness sensitive data safely without compromising compliance.

In just three months since its launch, DTS has already secured multiple Proof-of-Concept (PoC) projects with major enterprises, demonstrating its market potential across finance 💰, healthcare 🏥, and large language model (LLM) applications 🤖.


Security and Usability Combined 🔐

By integrating Differential Privacy and non-access data technologies, DTS eliminates any risk of re-identification.

At the same time, its intuitive drag-and-drop interface 🖱️ ensures that even non-technical users can generate and analyze synthetic data with ease.

This recognition underscores CUBIG’s technical excellence and market value. We remain committed to helping enterprises unlock the full potential of their data securely and efficiently.


📎 Read more
Read the full article(Click)📰


#CUBIG #SyntheticData #DifferentialPrivacy #DTS #AIInnovation #DataSecurity #InfoSecAward

notes.note: Articles › 🚀 CUBIG’s Synthetic Data Solution “SynFlow” Selected for Korea’s Scale-Up TIPS Program

segment.source: 🚀 CUBIG’s Synthetic Data Solution “SynFlow” Selected for Korea’s Scale-Up TIPS Program
segment.target: 🚀 CUBIG 합성 데이터 솔루션 'SynFlow', 대한민국 스케일업 TIPS 선정

segment.source: CUBIG’s SynFlow is selected for the Scale-Up TIPS program, securing up to KRW 1.2B in funding to advance commercialization and global expansion.
segment.target: CUBIG의 SynFlow가 스케일업 TIPS에 선정되어 최대 12억 원의 지원을 확보하고, 상용화 및 글로벌 확장을 가속합니다.

segment.source:
🚀 CUBIG’s Synthetic Data Solution “SynFlow” Selected for Korea’s Scale-Up TIPS Program

We’re thrilled to announce that CUBIG, the synthetic data company, has been selected for the Scale-Up TIPS program by the Ministry of SMEs and Startups in Korea.

With this milestone, CUBIG will receive up to KRW 1.2 billion (approx. USD 900K) in R&D funding over the next three years to accelerate the commercialization and advancement of SynFlow.


🔬 What Is SynFlow?

SynFlow is CUBIG’s next-generation synthetic data solution that overcomes the limitations of traditional data combination methods.

Its core strength lies in generating advanced persona-preserving synthetic data 👤, enabling organizations to combine datasets securely without compromising performance.

Unlike conventional pseudonymization methods, SynFlow eliminates issues such as performance degradation, processing delays, and reduced data usability.


💡 Why It Matters

  • Secure by design 🔐: Data owners generate synthetic datasets themselves, without exposing raw data externally.

  • Faster processing ⚡: Combination cycles reduced to within one week.

  • Cross-industry applicability 🌍: From finance and healthcare to government and public institutions, SynFlow ensures safe, efficient, and scalable data use.


📎 Read more
Read the full article(Click)📰


#CUBIG #SyntheticData #SynFlow #DifferentialPrivacy #AIInnovation #ScaleUpTIPS #DataSecurity

segment.target: 🔐 CUBIG: 민감 정보 노출 없이 고품질 합성 데이터 제공

segment.source: CUBIG redefines AI training data with Differential Privacy-powered solutions, delivering both security and performance for sensitive industries.
segment.target: CUBIG이 차분 프라이버시 기반 솔루션으로 AI 학습 데이터를 재정의하며, 민감 산업에서 보안과 성능을 모두 제공합니다.

segment.source:
🔐 CUBIG: Delivering High-Quality Synthetic Data Without Exposing Sensitive Information

We’re excited to share how CUBIG, the synthetic data company, is redefining the future of AI training data with our Differential Privacy-powered synthetic data solutions.


⚖️ Solving the Quality vs. Security Dilemma

Traditional synthetic data often faces a trade-off: better accuracy at the cost of weaker security, or stronger protection with reduced data quality.

CUBIG eliminates this problem by never accessing raw data directly. Instead, our technology leverages only statistical attributes 📊, enabling synthetic data that is both secure and high-performing.


🛠️ DTS & AZOO: Unlocking Safe Data Use

  • DTS (Data Transform System): A SaaS and on-premise solution that allows enterprises to safely generate synthetic data within their own infrastructure.

  • AZOO Marketplace: A platform where organizations can generate, validate, trade, and analyze synthetic data — all without exposing sensitive information.

These solutions empower industries such as finance 💰, defense 🛡️, and healthcare 🏥 to overcome regulatory barriers and leverage data safely for AI innovation.


🤝 Backed by Strong Partners and Investors

CUBIG has partnered with Naver, SK Telecom, and the Air Force ✈️ on Proof of Concept projects, while securing investment from Naver D2SF, Korea Development Bank, and CNTTech.


With mentorship and support from Seoul Business Agency (SBA), we’ve strengthened our business model and accelerated growth.


📎 Read more
Read the full article(Click)📰


#CUBIG #SyntheticData #DifferentialPrivacy #AIInnovation #DTS #AZOO #SBA

notes.note: Articles › 💼 CUBIG Attracts Investment from IBK Capital and Intops Investment

segment.source: 💼 CUBIG Attracts Investment from IBK Capital and Intops Investment
segment.target: 💼 CUBIG, IBK캐피탈 및 인탑스투자로부터 투자 유치

segment.source: Following its selection for IBK Changgong, CUBIG secures equity investment from IBK Capital and Intops Investment, reinforcing its leadership in Differential Privacy-based synthetic data.
segment.target: IBK 창공 선정에 이어, CUBIG이 IBK캐피탈과 인탑스투자로부터 지분 투자를 유치하여 차분 프라이버시 기반 합성 데이터 분야의 리더십을 강화합니다.

segment.source:
💼 CUBIG Attracts Investment from IBK Capital and Intops Investment


CUBIG, the synthetic data security company, has secured new funding from IBK Capital and Intops Investment.

This comes just two months after being selected as an innovation startup by IBK Changgong, adding to earlier investments from Naver and KDB Bank. With IBK Financial Group now on board, CUBIG continues to strengthen its network of strategic investors.


💡 Pre-Series A Round

According to the investment banking industry, CUBIG launched its Pre-Series A round last month to attract financial investors. CNTTech and KDB Bank participated in the round, purchasing newly issued RCPS shares.

IBK Capital and Intops Investment later joined with a slightly higher valuation, using the “IBKC-INTOPS New Technology Business Investment Partnership No.3” fund vehicle.


🔐 Technology Focus

Founded in 2021, CUBIG specializes in synthetic data powered by Differential Privacy (DP). Unlike traditional methods that require sharing original data with external servers, CUBIG’s solution generates synthetic datasets without exposing sensitive records — providing superior security while maintaining the advantages of synthetic data.

This technology is especially valuable in industries handling sensitive information such as finance, healthcare, and telecommunications. Multiple enterprises and institutions are currently engaged in PoC (Proof of Concept) projects with CUBIG.


📈 Market Growth

Synthetic data is gaining attention as a critical enabler for AI development. In 2022, it was listed among MIT’s Top 10 Breakthrough Technologies.

According to Grand View Research, the global synthetic data generation market was valued at USD 120 million in 2021 and is projected to grow at a CAGR of 34.8% from 2022 to 2030.


With rising demand, CUBIG is well positioned to capture opportunities in this rapidly expanding market.

CUBIG plans to use the newly raised funds to enhance its services and accelerate overseas expansion. Investors expect significant revenue growth to begin in 2025.


📎 Read more
Read the full article(Click)📰


#CUBIG #SyntheticData #DifferentialPrivacy #AIInnovation #IBKCapital #IntopsInvestment #Investment #GlobalExpansion

notes.note: Articles › 🏆 CUBIG Wins “Best of Demo Day” at 2024 AI Security Day

segment.source: 🏆 CUBIG Wins “Best of Demo Day” at 2024 AI Security Day
segment.target: 🏆 CUBIG, 2024 AI Security Day 'Best of Demo Day' 수상

segment.source: CUBIG was awarded Best of Demo Day at the 2024 AI Security Day for its Differential Privacy-powered synthetic data solutions, setting new standards in secure AI innovatio
segment.target: CUBIG이 차분 프라이버시 기반 합성 데이터 솔루션으로 2024 AI Security Day Best of Demo Day를 수상하며, 안전한 AI 혁신의 새로운 기준을 제시했습니다.

segment.source:
🏆 CUBIG Wins “Best of Demo Day” at 2024 AI Security Day

We’re proud to share that CUBIG, the synthetic data company, has been awarded Best of Demo Day at the 2024 AI Security Day, hosted by the Ministry of Science and ICT and KISA (Korea Internet & Security Agency).

This award highlights CUBIG’s innovation in Differential Privacy (DP)-powered synthetic data, setting a new benchmark for secure 🔐 and high-performance ⚡ AI data solutions.

💻 Our Solutions: DTS & AZOO

At the event, CUBIG showcased two core products:

  • DTS (Data Transform System): A SaaS solution that allows anyone to generate synthetic data locally with drag-and-drop simplicity, without exposing raw information.

  • AZOO Marketplace: A secure web platform where enterprises can trade, analyze, and evaluate the quality of synthetic datasets — all while ensuring privacy and compliance.


🌟 Why We Stood Out

Unlike conventional methods that require direct access to raw data, CUBIG’s approach uses data non-access with Differential Privacy.

This ensures that sensitive information is never exposed 🔒 while maintaining State-of-the-Art (SOTA) performance — even surpassing leading global solutions 🌍.


Following a successful Pre-A funding round led by Korea Development Bank, CUBIG is actively preparing for global expansion.

With ongoing collaborations and growing partnerships, we are committed to diversifying our solutions and building a safer, more innovative synthetic data ecosystem.


📎 Read more
Read the full article(Click)📰


#CUBIG #SyntheticData #DifferentialPrivacy #AIInnovation #AISecurity #DemoDay #GlobalExpansion

segment.source: CUBIG raises Pre-Series A funding from CNTTech–DB Dream Big Fund, reinforcing its global potential in secure synthetic data innovation.
segment.target: CUBIG이 CNTTech-DB Dream Big Fund로부터 프리시리즈 A 투자를 유치하여, 안전한 합성 데이터 혁신의 글로벌 성장 가능성을 강화합니다.

segment.source:
💡 CUBIG Secures Pre-Series A Funding from CNTTech–DB Dream Big Fund


We’re excited to share that CUBIG, the synthetic data company, has raised its Pre-Series A round from the CNTTech–DB Dream Big Investment Fund, jointly established by accelerator CNTTech and DB Capital, the venture arm of DB Group.

This funding validates CUBIG’s unique technology 🚀 and strong potential 🌍 in the rapidly expanding global synthetic data market.


Our Technology Advantage 🔐

CUBIG’s synthetic data solution is powered by Differential Privacy (DP), ensuring that original datasets cannot be reverse-engineered.

Users can easily generate secure synthetic data without coding skills, and importantly, all data can be created safely within internal servers 🖥️ — without uploading sensitive information to external clouds ☁️.

This makes CUBIG’s solution ideal for industries like finance 💰, healthcare 🏥, and public services 🏛️, where strict data security and compliance are essential.


Growing Global Demand 🌏

As demand for AI training data surges worldwide 📈, synthetic data has become a critical enabler to address data scarcity.

Industry leaders recognize that CUBIG stands out by delivering both high-quality performance and strengthened security 🔒 in synthetic data generation.

With this investment, we are accelerating our mission to expand globally 🌍, monetize faster 💡, and empower enterprises with privacy-first AI data solutions.


CUBIG is committed to building a safer, more efficient data ecosystem — one where sensitive information remains protected while fueling the next wave of AI innovation.


📎 Read more
Read the full article(Click)📰


#CUBIG #SyntheticData #DifferentialPrivacy #AIInnovation #PreSeriesA #Investment #GlobalExpansion

notes.note: Articles › 🔐 CUBIG Develops Differential Privacy-Based Synthetic Data Solution

segment.source: 🔐 CUBIG Develops Differential Privacy-Based Synthetic Data Solution
segment.target: 🔐 CUBIG, 차분 프라이버시 기반 합성 데이터 솔루션 개발

segment.source: CUBIG introduces a Differential Privacy-powered synthetic data solution, combining state-of-the-art performance with uncompromised data security.
segment.target: CUBIG이 최신 성능과 타협 없는 데이터 보안을 결합한 차분 프라이버시 기반 합성 데이터 솔루션을 도입합니다.

segment.source:
🔐 CUBIG Develops Differential Privacy-Based Synthetic Data Solution

We’re excited to share that CUBIG, the synthetic data company, has developed its own synthetic data solution powered by Differential Privacy (DP) — providing a secure alternative for handling sensitive data in the age of AI.


💡 Why It Matters

Traditional synthetic data solutions often face a trade-off: high performance but poor security, or stronger protection but limited usability.

CUBIG’s new approach eliminates this dilemma by integrating Differential Privacy, the same advanced algorithm used by the US Census Bureau and leading global tech companies.


🏆 SOTA Performance and Security

Our DP-based solution maintains State-of-the-Art (SOTA) levels in both performance and protection.

Once applied, the privacy guarantees remain intact, ensuring that sensitive records cannot be reconstructed or re-identified.

This not only minimizes legal risks but also provides strong resistance against re-identification and reconstruction attacks.


🌏 Cubig DTS

“Our solution proves that synthetic data can be both powerful and safe,” said Bae Ho, CEO of CUBIG.

“As we expand globally, we will continue to prioritize privacy and sensitive data security, positioning CUBIG as a leader in the next generation of synthetic data technologies.”

With this breakthrough, CUBIG reaffirms its mission to create a safer, more responsible data ecosystem — enabling enterprises and institutions to innovate without compromise.


📎 Read more
Read the full article(Click)📰


#CUBIG #SyntheticData #DifferentialPrivacy #AIInnovation #DataSecurity #PrivacyTech

notes.note: Articles › 🎉CUBIG Wins Global Innovator Award at NextRise 2024

segment.source: 🎉CUBIG Wins Global Innovator Award at NextRise 2024
CUBIG has been honored with the Global Innovator Award at NextRise 2024, recognizing our strength in synthetic data innovation and global scalability.
segment.target: CUBIG이 합성 데이터 혁신과 글로벌 확장성의 역량을 인정받아 NextRise 2024 Global Innovator Award를 수상했습니다.

segment.source:
🏆 CUBIG Wins Global Innovator Award at NextRise 2024!

We’re proud to announce that CUBIG, the synthetic data company, has been awarded the Global Innovator Award at NextRise 2024 Seoul, Korea’s largest startup exhibition.

Hosted by KITA and KDB Bank since 2019, NextRise is a premier global startup fair. Among the finalists of the NextRise 2024 Awards, CUBIG was honored after being evaluated on technology, business scalability, and team competitiveness.

This recognition is a major milestone that validates our strength and market value in synthetic data.

📌 What is AZOO?

CUBIG launched AZOO, a synthetic data platform where anyone can generate secure, high-performance data without coding—simply through Drag & Drop.

Powered by state-of-the-art Differential Privacy, AZOO ensures both privacy and utility, producing synthetic data that retains up to 99% of original performance.

The AZOO marketplace also offers integration with other companies’ datasets and natural language-based analytics tools.

📌 What is DTS?

We also introduced DTS, a program that allows sensitive data to be shared securely across affiliates.

Complex data merging processes that previously took days can now be completed in just a few hours with secure synthetic transformation.

This enables not only AI training but also the lawful circulation of sensitive datasets that were once restricted.


This award strengthens our resolve to expand AZOO and DTS globally, building on our unique synthetic data algorithms and privacy-preserving AI.

At CUBIG, we’re committed to creating a safer, more innovative data ecosystem where enterprises and researchers can thrive.


📎 Read more
Read the full article📰


#CUBIG #SyntheticData #DifferentialPrivacy #AIInnovation #NextRise2024 #DataSecurity #GlobalInnovator

notes.note: Articles › 🔥CUBIG selected for the 14th Kibo Venture Camp

segment.source: 🔥CUBIG selected for the 14th Kibo Venture Camp
CUBIG has been officially selected for the 14th Kibo Venture Camp by KIBO, marking an important milestone that validates our leadership in synthetic data innovation
segment.target: CUBIG이 기보의 제14회 기보벤처캠프에 공식 선정되어, 합성 데이터 혁신 분야의 리더십을 검증하는 중요한 이정표를 세웠습니다

segment.source:
🚀 CUBIG Selected for the 14th Kibo Venture Camp


We’re thrilled to share that CUBIG, the synthetic data company, has been officially selected for the 14th “Kibo Venture Camp,” organized by the Korea Technology Finance Corporation (KIBO).

This recognition underscores CUBIG’s expertise and growth potential. The program supports high-potential startups with technology guarantees, investments, consulting, and technology transfer—making this selection an important milestone that validates our role as a leader in synthetic data innovation.


📌 What is Kibo Venture Camp?

Kibo Venture Camp is a specialized acceleration program designed to help promising startups grow and scale. In partnership with private accelerators, it provides a unique platform that combines financial support, expert mentoring, and strategic guidance.

By being selected, CUBIG joins a dynamic ecosystem dedicated to accelerating breakthrough innovation and supporting companies that are shaping the future of technology.


🔜 What’s Next for CUBIG?

This June, we’re excited to launch AZOO, our synthetic data platform that enables users to securely generate, combine, and trade synthetic data.

  • Privacy-first approach: By integrating Differential Privacy, AZOO protects personal information, prevents illegal misuse of data, and shields against the latest AI-driven attacks.

  • High-performance synthetic data: AZOO delivers data that retains up to 99% of the performance of the original dataset.

  • Ready for AI training: No need for additional preprocessing such as labeling—synthetic data from AZOO is ready to use, making AI development faster, safer, and more efficient.


With this selection, CUBIG is more motivated than ever to scale its impact and keep building a safer, more efficient data ecosystem.

We remain committed to driving innovation in synthetic data so that companies and researchers around the world can move forward with confidence.

📎 Read more
Read the full article📰

#CUBIG #SyntheticData #KiboVentureCamp #AIInnovation #DataPrivacy #AZOO

segment.source: LLM Capsule enables enterprise AI adoption by keeping raw data inside your environment, preserving document structure and business context during AI processing, and restoring usable outputs through local restoration — so enterprise teams can safely use any LLM on real documents in production workflows.
segment.target: LLM Capsule은 원본 데이터를 기업 환경 내부에 유지하고, AI 처리 과정에서 문서 구조와 비즈니스 컨텍스트를 보존하며, 로컬 Restoration을 통해 사용 가능한 결과물을 복원합니다. 기업 팀은 실제 문서를 프로덕션 워크플로우에서 안전하게 모든 LLM과 함께 활용할 수 있습니다.

segment.source: Most enterprise AI security tools either block AI usage entirely or strip critical context through masking and redaction, producing outputs that cannot be used in real business processes. LLM Capsule takes a different approach: local encapsulation protects sensitive elements before AI processing, structure-preserving processing maintains document integrity for AI comprehension, local restoration auto-restores AI outputs with original enterprise data, and cross-model execution means no vendor lock-in. This enables enterprise AI enablement on document-heavy workflows including contracts, claims, regulatory filings, medical records, and internal reports.
segment.target: 대부분의 기업 AI 보안 도구는 AI 사용을 완전히 차단하거나, 마스킹과 삭제를 통해 핵심 컨텍스트를 제거하여 실제 비즈니스 프로세스에서 사용할 수 없는 결과물을 생성합니다. LLM Capsule은 다른 접근 방식을 취합니다. 로컬 Encapsulation으로 AI 처리 전에 민감 요소를 보호하고, 구조 보존 처리로 AI가 이해할 수 있도록 문서 무결성을 유지하며, 로컬 Restoration으로 원본 기업 데이터를 자동 복원하고, 크로스 모델 실행으로 벤더 종속을 방지합니다. 계약서, 보험 청구서, 규제 서류, 의료 기록, 내부 보고서 등 문서 중심 워크플로우에서 기업 AI 활성화를 실현합니다.

segment.source: LLM Capsule Dashboard — Real-time encapsulation pipeline with document processing status
segment.target: LLM Capsule 대시보드 — 실시간 Encapsulation 파이프라인 및 문서 처리 현황

segment.source: Enterprise AI enablement through five core
segment.target: 다섯 가지 핵심 역량을 통한 기업 AI 활성화

segment.source: LLM Capsule enables enterprise AI adoption on sensitive data through a 3+2 architecture — three core enablement capabilities plus structure-preserving processing and cross-model execution.
segment.target: LLM Capsule은 3+2 아키텍처를 통해 민감 데이터에 대한 기업 AI 도입을 지원합니다. 세 가지 핵심 활성화 역량에 구조 보존 처리와 크로스 모델 실행을 더한 구조입니다.

segment.source: These capabilities let enterprises adopt AI without sacrificing data protection or workflow usability. This is what separates enterprise AI enablement from traditional masking tools.
segment.target: 이 역량들을 통해 기업은 데이터 보호나 워크플로우 활용성을 희생하지 않고 AI를 도입할 수 있습니다. 이것이 기업 AI 활성화와 기존 마스킹 도구의 근본적인 차이입니다.

segment.source: Encapsulate before outbound — raw data never
segment.target: 외부 전송 전 Encapsulate — 원본 데이터는 절대

segment.source: LLM Capsule encapsulates sensitive entities locally before any data leaves the enterprise environment.
segment.target: LLM Capsule은 데이터가 기업 환경을 벗어나기 전에 민감 요소를 로컬에서 Encapsulate합니다.

segment.source: Document Encapsulation — Before and after view of a contract with sensitive data replaced by tokens
segment.target: 문서 Encapsulation — 민감 데이터가 토큰으로 대체된 계약서의 전후 비교

segment.source: LLM Capsule encapsulates sensitive entities locally before any data leaves the enterprise environment. Only the protected capsule is sent for AI processing.
segment.target: LLM Capsule은 데이터가 기업 환경을 벗어나기 전에 민감 요소를 로컬에서 Encapsulate합니다. 보호된 캡슐만 AI 처리를 위해 전송됩니다.

segment.source: Raw data stays inside the enterprise environment. Sensitive elements are detected and replaced before any outbound transmission.
segment.target: 원본 데이터는 기업 환경 내부에 유지됩니다. 민감 요소는 외부 전송 전에 탐지 및 대체됩니다.

segment.source: Supports controlled enterprise and regulated environments including on-premise, air-gapped, and VPC deployments.
segment.target: 온프레미스, 망분리, VPC 배포를 포함한 통제된 기업 및 규제 환경을 지원합니다.

segment.source: Protected Outbound Flow — Encapsulated data crossing trust boundary while original values remain inside
segment.target: 보호된 외부 전송 흐름 — Encapsulate된 데이터가 신뢰 경계를 넘는 동안 원본 값은 내부에 유지

segment.source: Most enterprise AI risk starts when raw business data is exposed outside the controlled environment. With LLM Capsule, sensitive content is transformed locally so external models never receive the raw original data.
segment.target: 대부분의 기업 AI 리스크는 원본 비즈니스 데이터가 통제된 환경 외부에 노출될 때 시작됩니다. LLM Capsule을 사용하면 민감 콘텐츠가 로컬에서 변환되므로 외부 모델은 원본 데이터를 수신하지 않습니다.

segment.source: Only encapsulated representations cross the trust boundary. The AI provider processes useful but opaque data.
segment.target: Encapsulate된 표현만 신뢰 경계를 넘습니다. AI 공급자는 유용하지만 불투명한 데이터를 처리합니다.

segment.source: Every encapsulation event is logged with full traceability for enterprise AI governance and compliance reporting.
segment.target: 모든 Encapsulation 이벤트는 기업 AI 거버넌스 및 컴플라이언스 보고를 위한 완전한 추적성과 함께 기록됩니다.

segment.source: Enterprise workflows do not run on plain text alone. They rely on reports, PDFs, spreadsheets, diagrams, presentations, tables, and mixed-format documents.
segment.target: 기업 워크플로우는 일반 텍스트만으로 운영되지 않습니다. 보고서, PDF, 스프레드시트, 다이어그램, 프레젠테이션, 테이블, 복합 형식 문서에 의존합니다.

segment.source: Flat masking treats every sensitive value identically, collapsing entity relationships and breaking table schemas. Structure-preserving processing maintains entity consistency across entire documents, preserves table column relationships for accurate extraction, and keeps cross-reference links intact. This is document-aware protection — not flat text anonymization.
segment.target: 단순 마스킹은 모든 민감 값을 동일하게 처리하여 엔티티 관계를 붕괴시키고 테이블 스키마를 깨뜨립니다. 구조 보존 처리는 전체 문서에 걸쳐 엔티티 일관성을 유지하고, 정확한 추출을 위해 테이블 컬럼 관계를 보존하며, 상호 참조 링크를 온전히 유지합니다. 이것은 문서 인식 보호이며, 단순 텍스트 익명화가 아닙니다.

segment.source: Protected processing with layout, formatting, and section structure preserved. AI receives structurally complete documents.
segment.target: 레이아웃, 서식, 섹션 구조가 보존된 상태에서 보호 처리됩니다. AI는 구조적으로 완전한 문서를 수신합니다.

segment.source: Tabular data structure maintained through encapsulation and restoration. Column headers, row relationships, and cell references preserved.
segment.target: Encapsulation과 Restoration을 통해 표 형식 데이터 구조가 유지됩니다. 컬럼 헤더, 행 관계, 셀 참조가 보존됩니다.

segment.source: Visual and mixed-format documents handled as structured content. Cross-references and entity relationships remain trackable.
segment.target: 시각적 및 복합 형식 문서가 구조화된 콘텐츠로 처리됩니다. 상호 참조와 엔티티 관계가 추적 가능한 상태로 유지됩니다.
기업 워크플로우를 깨뜨리지 않는 AI 활성화

segment.source: LLM Capsule does more than hide data. It auto-restores usable output inside the environment after AI processing so enterprise teams can actually use the result in real workflows. This is a restorable workflow — not just protection, but AI enablement with usable output.
segment.target: LLM Capsule은 단순히 데이터를 숨기는 것이 아닙니다. AI 처리 후 환경 내부에서 사용 가능한 결과물을 자동 복원하여 기업 팀이 실제 워크플로우에서 결과를 바로 활용할 수 있습니다. 이것은 복원 가능한 워크플로우입니다. 단순한 보호가 아닌, 사용 가능한 결과물을 제공하는 AI 활성화입니다.

segment.source: Traditional masking protects data by removing meaning. That may reduce risk, but it also reduces output quality and business usability. Restored outputs from LLM Capsule are directly usable in: claims documents with real policyholder data, legal reviews with real party names and clause references, regulatory reports with real customer and account data, and internal analysis with real business metrics.
segment.target: 기존 마스킹은 의미를 제거하여 데이터를 보호합니다. 이는 리스크를 줄일 수 있지만, 결과물 품질과 비즈니스 활용성도 함께 저하됩니다. LLM Capsule의 복원된 결과물은 실제 보험계약자 데이터가 포함된 청구 문서, 실제 당사자명과 조항 참조가 포함된 법률 검토, 실제 고객 및 계좌 데이터가 포함된 규제 보고서, 실제 비즈니스 지표가 포함된 내부 분석에 바로 활용할 수 있습니다.

segment.source: This is the capability that makes enterprise AI operationally viable. Secure document summarization, AI claims processing, and confidential contract review with AI all depend on the ability to restore results. Without restoration, every AI output requires manual reconstruction — eliminating the efficiency gains AI is supposed to deliver.
segment.target: 이것이 기업 AI를 운영적으로 실현 가능하게 만드는 핵심 역량입니다. 안전한 문서 요약, AI 보험 청구 처리, AI 기반 기밀 계약 검토 모두 결과물 복원 역량에 의존합니다. Restoration 없이는 모든 AI 결과물을 수동으로 재구성해야 하며, 이는 AI가 제공해야 할 효율성 향상을 무력화합니다.

segment.source: [PERSON_01] submitted claim #[ID_04] on [DATE_02] for property at [ADDR_03]. Total assessed damage: [AMOUNT_01].
segment.target: [PERSON_01]이 [DATE_02]에 [ADDR_03] 소재 부동산에 대해 청구 #[ID_04]를 제출했습니다. 총 산정 피해액: [AMOUNT_01].

segment.source: James Mitchell submitted claim #INS-2024-0847 on March 5, 2025 for property at 42 Lincoln Ave, Chicago. Total assessed damage: $247,000.
segment.target: James Mitchell이 2025년 3월 5일에 Chicago 42 Lincoln Ave 소재 부동산에 대해 청구 #INS-2024-0847을 제출했습니다. 총 산정 피해액: $247,000.

segment.source: Control what matters to your business — beyond generic
segment.target: 비즈니스에 중요한 것을 제어 — 일반적인 PII를 넘어

segment.source: LLM Capsule lets teams define sensitive entities beyond standard PII categories, including internal identifiers, project names, customer-specific markers, and organization-specific confidential terms.
segment.target: LLM Capsule은 내부 식별자, 프로젝트명, 고객별 마커, 조직 고유 기밀 용어를 포함하여 표준 PII 범주를 넘어서는 민감 항목을 팀이 직접 정의할 수 있게 합니다.

segment.source: Enterprise data protection is not limited to names, phone numbers, or IDs. Real workflows often depend on internal project names, contract references, operational code names, and confidential business terms. Context-aware data control enables policy-based sensitivity classification that adapts to document type, department origin, and workflow context — providing enterprise AI governance controls that go far beyond standard PII regex matching.
segment.target: 기업 데이터 보호는 이름, 전화번호, ID에 국한되지 않습니다. 실제 워크플로우는 내부 프로젝트명, 계약 참조, 운영 코드명, 기밀 비즈니스 용어에 의존하는 경우가 많습니다. 컨텍스트 인식 데이터 제어는 문서 유형, 부서, 워크플로우 컨텍스트에 따라 적응하는 정책 기반 민감도 분류를 지원하며, 표준 PII 정규식 매칭을 훨씬 뛰어넘는 기업 AI 거버넌스 제어를 제공합니다.
기업 AI 거버넌스를 위한 운영 제어

segment.source: Enterprise deployment requires more than transformation logic. Teams need policy control, access control, activity visibility, and auditability.
segment.target: 기업 배포에는 변환 로직 이상이 필요합니다. 팀에는 정책 제어, 접근 제어, 활동 가시성, 감사 가능성이 필요합니다.

segment.source: Enterprise AI governance requires evidence of data protection at every stage — what data was processed, how it was protected, which models interacted with it, and who authorized the workflow. LLM Capsule's admin capabilities provide this auditability across all AI interactions.
segment.target: 기업 AI 거버넌스는 모든 단계에서 데이터 보호 증거를 요구합니다. 어떤 데이터가 처리되었는지, 어떻게 보호되었는지, 어떤 모델이 상호작용했는지, 누가 워크플로우를 승인했는지가 포함됩니다. LLM Capsule의 관리 기능은 모든 AI 상호작용에 대한 감사 가능성을 제공합니다.

segment.source: Model-agnostic — use any LLM with no vendor
segment.target: 모델 비종속 — 벤더 종속 없이 모든 LLM 사용

segment.source: Enterprise teams do not always standardize on a single AI model.
segment.target: 기업 팀이 단일 AI 모델로 표준화하는 것은 현실적이지 않습니다.

segment.source: Enterprise teams do not always standardize on a single AI model. Evaluation, governance, and operational workflows may span multiple providers and multiple model choices over time. LLM Capsule fits this reality as an AI enablement data layer for cross-model enterprise AI deployment.
segment.target: 기업 팀이 단일 AI 모델로 표준화하는 것은 현실적이지 않습니다. 평가, 거버넌스, 운영 워크플로우는 시간이 지남에 따라 다수의 공급자와 다양한 모델 선택지에 걸칠 수 있습니다. LLM Capsule은 크로스 모델 기업 AI 배포를 위한 AI 활성화 데이터 레이어로서 이 현실에 부합합니다.

segment.source: Because LLM Capsule operates at the data layer — not the model layer — protection and enablement remain stable even when model vendors change. ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, or any LLM API can be used interchangeably without reconfiguring the pipeline. This is cross-model execution — enterprise AI enablement independent of any specific AI provider, eliminating vendor lock-in.
segment.target: LLM Capsule은 모델 레이어가 아닌 데이터 레이어에서 작동하므로, 모델 벤더가 변경되어도 보호와 활성화가 안정적으로 유지됩니다. ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity 또는 모든 LLM API를 파이프라인 재구성 없이 상호 교환하여 사용할 수 있습니다. 이것이 크로스 모델 실행입니다. 특정 AI 공급자에 종속되지 않는 기업 AI 활성화로 벤더 lock-in을 제거합니다.

segment.source: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, or any LLM API — protection stays consistent regardless of which model you choose.
segment.target: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity 또는 모든 LLM API — 어떤 모델을 선택하든 보호는 일관되게 유지됩니다.

segment.source: LLM Capsule works as a deployable component through API and SDK integration patterns, making it practical to embed into existing products, portals, and internal workflows.
segment.target: LLM Capsule은 API 및 SDK 통합 패턴을 통해 배포 가능한 컴포넌트로 작동하여, 기존 제품, 포털, 내부 워크플로우에 실용적으로 임베드할 수 있습니다.

segment.source: The API provides LLM API enablement at the data layer — wrap any existing AI integration with encapsulation and restoration without rebuilding the application.
segment.target: API는 데이터 레이어에서 LLM API 활성화를 제공합니다. 애플리케이션을 재구축하지 않고 기존 AI 통합에 Encapsulation과 Restoration을 적용할 수 있습니다.

segment.source: Enterprise AI deployment — ready for any controlled
segment.target: 기업 AI 배포 — 모든 통제된 환경에 대응

segment.source: Enterprise teams need deployment flexibility without giving up control.
segment.target: 기업 팀에는 통제력을 포기하지 않으면서도 유연한 배포 옵션이 필요합니다.

segment.source: Enterprise teams need deployment flexibility without giving up control. LLM Capsule supports on-premise deployment, air-gapped environments, cloud deployment including AWS Marketplace, hybrid configurations, and embedded integration. The same product logic runs across all deployment models while keeping local protection and local restoration at the center.
segment.target: 기업 팀에는 통제력을 포기하지 않으면서도 유연한 배포 옵션이 필요합니다. LLM Capsule은 온프레미스 배포, 망분리 환경, AWS Marketplace를 포함한 클라우드 배포, 하이브리드 구성, 임베디드 통합을 지원합니다. 동일한 제품 로직이 모든 배포 모델에서 실행되며, 로컬 보호와 로컬 Restoration을 중심에 둡니다.

segment.source: LLM Capsule API Console — SDK integration with enterprise document management systems
segment.target: LLM Capsule API 콘솔 — 기업 문서 관리 시스템과의 SDK 통합

segment.source: How LLM Capsule differs from traditional
segment.target: LLM Capsule과 기존 접근 방식의 차이

segment.source: Not all protection approaches are designed for usable enterprise AI workflows. Traditional masking protects data by reducing usability. LLM Capsule protects data while preserving enterprise workflow value.
segment.target: 모든 보호 접근 방식이 사용 가능한 기업 AI 워크플로우를 위해 설계된 것은 아닙니다. 기존 마스킹은 활용성을 저하시켜 데이터를 보호합니다. LLM Capsule은 기업 워크플로우 가치를 보존하면서 데이터를 보호합니다.

segment.source: AI results are auto-restored through local restoration. This is the fundamental capability that separates LLM Capsule from every other approach — enterprise AI enablement that produces usable outputs, not abstracted placeholders.
segment.target: AI 결과물은 로컬 Restoration을 통해 자동 복원됩니다. 이것이 LLM Capsule을 다른 모든 접근 방식과 구분하는 근본적인 역량입니다. 추상화된 플레이스홀더가 아닌, 사용 가능한 결과물을 생성하는 기업 AI 활성화입니다.

segment.source: See how LLM Capsule fits your environment, documents, and controls
segment.target: LLM Capsule이 귀사의 환경, 문서, 제어 체계에 어떻게 적합한지 확인하십시오

segment.source: Bring your documents, deployment constraints, and evaluation questions…
segment.target: 문서, 배포 조건, 평가 질문을 준비해 주세요…

segment.source: LLM Capsule is an AI enablement data layer and plugin that enables enterprises to adopt any AI model safely. It sits between enterprise data systems and external AI services — protecting data in transit while unlocking the full power of AI across every workflow.
segment.target: LLM Capsule은 기업이 모든 AI 모델을 안전하게 도입할 수 있도록 지원하는 AI 활성화 데이터 레이어이자 플러그인입니다. 기업 데이터 시스템과 외부 AI 서비스 사이에 위치하여 전송 중인 데이터를 보호하면서 모든 워크플로우에서 AI의 잠재력을 최대한 활용합니다.

segment.source: LLM Capsule operates as an AI enablement data layer that encapsulates sensitive enterprise data locally, transmits only protected representations to any external AI service, and restores AI outputs within the enterprise environment — enabling safe AI adoption at scale.
segment.target: LLM Capsule은 민감 데이터를 로컬에서 Encapsulation하고, 보호된 표현만 외부 AI 서비스로 전송하며, AI 출력을 기업 환경 내에서 Restoration하는 AI 활성화 데이터 레이어입니다. 대규모 AI 도입을 안전하게 실현합니다.

segment.source: The encapsulation engine operates entirely within the enterprise environment. It detects sensitive elements using context-aware data control, replaces them with structure-preserving representations, and stores the mapping locally. The mapping never leaves the enterprise boundary.
segment.target: Encapsulation 엔진은 기업 환경 내에서 완전히 작동합니다. 컨텍스트 인식 데이터 제어를 사용하여 민감 요소를 감지하고, 구조 보존 표현으로 대체하며, 매핑을 로컬에 저장합니다. 매핑은 기업 경계를 벗어나지 않습니다.

segment.source: Enterprise context control enables organizations to define sensitivity policies beyond standard PII detection. Sensitivity classification adapts to document type, department, workflow context, and regulatory requirements. Administrators configure policies through the admin console.
segment.target: 기업 컨텍스트 제어를 통해 표준 PII 탐지를 넘어서는 민감도 정책을 정의할 수 있습니다. 민감도 분류는 문서 유형, 부서, 워크플로우 컨텍스트, 규제 요건에 따라 적응합니다. 관리자는 관리 콘솔을 통해 정책을 설정합니다.

segment.source: Only encapsulated documents cross the trust boundary. The AI provider receives structurally complete documents with protected values — useful for AI processing but opaque to the receiving service. Zero exposure of original sensitive data.
segment.target: Encapsulation된 문서만 신뢰 경계를 통과합니다. AI 제공자는 보호된 값이 포함된 구조적으로 완전한 문서를 수신합니다. AI 처리에는 유용하지만 수신 서비스에는 불투명합니다. 원본 민감 데이터의 노출은 제로입니다.

segment.source: After AI processing completes, the restoration engine applies the locally stored mapping to AI outputs. Original names, figures, dates, and references are restored automatically. Restored outputs are directly usable in enterprise workflows.
segment.target: AI 처리가 완료되면 Restoration 엔진이 로컬에 저장된 매핑을 AI 출력에 적용합니다. 원래 이름, 수치, 날짜, 참조 정보가 자동으로 복원됩니다. 복원된 출력은 기업 워크플로우에서 바로 사용할 수 있습니다.

segment.source: Every encapsulation and restoration event is logged with complete audit trails. Organizations can track what data was protected, when, by whom, and which AI services processed it. Audit data supports enterprise AI governance and regulatory compliance requirements.
segment.target: 모든 Encapsulation 및 Restoration 이벤트는 완전한 감사 추적과 함께 기록됩니다. 어떤 데이터가 언제, 누구에 의해 보호되었으며 어떤 AI 서비스가 처리했는지 추적할 수 있습니다. 감사 데이터는 기업 AI 거버넌스 및 규제 컴플라이언스 요건을 지원합니다.

segment.source: LLM Capsule enables AI anywhere your infrastructure runs. The encapsulation and restoration logic is identical regardless of deployment model — so you can adopt AI across every environment.
segment.target: LLM Capsule은 인프라가 운영되는 어디서든 AI를 가능하게 합니다. Encapsulation과 Restoration 로직은 배포 모델에 관계없이 동일하므로 모든 환경에서 AI를 도입할 수 있습니다.

segment.source: Full deployment within the enterprise data center. Sensitive data never traverses any network boundary. Operates within existing security perimeters.
segment.target: 기업 데이터 센터 내 전체 배포 방식입니다. 민감 데이터가 네트워크 경계를 벗어나지 않습니다. 기존 보안 경계 내에서 운영됩니다.

segment.source: For the most sensitive environments. Encapsulation on the isolated network, controlled transfer to AI-connected environment, results transferred back for local restoration.
segment.target: 최고 수준의 보안이 요구되는 환경을 위한 방식입니다. 격리 네트워크에서 Encapsulation을 수행하고, AI 연결 환경으로 통제된 전송 후 결과를 로컬에서 Restoration합니다.

segment.source: Runs within the enterprise's AWS account or VPC. Data remains within the enterprise's cloud boundary. Available on AWS Marketplace for streamlined procurement.
segment.target: 기업의 AWS 계정 또는 VPC 내에서 실행됩니다. 데이터는 기업의 클라우드 경계 내에 유지됩니다. 간편한 조달을 위해 AWS Marketplace에서 이용 가능합니다.

segment.source: Different document types or sensitivity levels route through different deployment modes within a single LLM Capsule instance. Maximum flexibility.
segment.target: 문서 유형이나 민감도 수준에 따라 단일 LLM Capsule 인스턴스 내에서 서로 다른 배포 모드로 라우팅됩니다. 최대한의 유연성을 제공합니다.

segment.source: LLM Capsule embedded into existing enterprise applications and platforms, operating as an AI enablement data layer within your software stack.
segment.target: LLM Capsule을 기존 기업 애플리케이션 및 플랫폼에 임베디드하여 소프트웨어 스택 내 AI 활성화 데이터 레이어로 운영합니다.

segment.source: Bring your documents, deployment constraints, and evaluation criteria. We demonstrate on your actual workflows.
segment.target: 문서, 배포 제약 조건, 평가 기준을 가져오세요. 실제 워크플로우에서 시연합니다.

segment.source: LLM Capsule is priced for enterprise deployment. Contact us for volume-based pricing tailored to your document processing workload and deployment requirements.
segment.target: LLM Capsule은 엔터프라이즈 배포에 최적화된 요금 체계를 제공합니다. 문서 처리 규모와 배포 요구사항에 맞춘 볼륨 기반 견적을 문의해 주십시오.

segment.target: 문서, 배포 제약 조건, 평가 기준을 가져오세요. 실제 워크플로우에서 시연합니다.

segment.source: Regulated and document-heavy industries can now adopt AI on real enterprise data. LLM Capsule is an AI enablement data layer and plugin that removes the data exposure barrier blocking

segment.source: Regulated and document-heavy industries can now adopt AI on real enterprise data. LLM Capsule is an AI enablement data layer and plugin that removes the data exposure barrier blocking enterprise AI adoption — enabling AI first, protecting data at the data layer.
segment.target: 규제가 엄격하고 문서 집약적인 산업에서도 실제 기업 데이터에 AI를 도입할 수 있습니다. LLM Capsule은 기업 AI 도입을 막는 데이터 노출 장벽을 제거하는 AI 활성화 데이터 레이어 및 플러그인으로, AI를 우선 활성화하고 데이터 레이어에서 보호합니다.
